library(tidyverse)
library(marginaleffects)
library(fixest)
library(gam)
library(splines)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
library(useful)
library(purrr)
library(patchwork)
library(rms)
library(tidycensus)
library(tigris)
library(sf)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)
library(did)
library(haven)
library(bea.R)
library(lpdid)
library(DIDmultiplegtDYN)
library(ggpattern)
library(countrycode)
library(stringr)
library(ggpattern)
library(scales)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ggpubr)
library(splp)

options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)

source("emileRegs.R")

Data

data <- read_stata("raw data/DATA_hurricane_mortality_temp_month_state_19302015.dta")
data$month_year <- paste0(data$year, sprintf("%02d", data$month))
data$month_state <- paste0(data$month, "_", data$state_abbrev)



irf <- cumulative_dl(
  data = data,
  outcome = "dths_tot_pop",
  main_var = "maxs",
  controls = "tavg:as.factor(stfips) + tavg^2:as.factor(stfips) +
    modate:as.factor(stfips) + modate^2:as.factor(stfips) + modate^3:as.factor(stfips) + modate^4:as.factor(stfips) +
    modate^5:as.factor(stfips) + modate^6:as.factor(stfips) + modate^7:as.factor(stfips) + modate^8:as.factor(stfips) ",
  lags = 0:240,
  fe = "stfips + month_state ",
  panel_id = c("stfips", "month_year"),
  vcov_formula = "iid",
  shock_label = "Max Wind Speed"
)


# --- Plot ---
ggplot(irf, aes(x = lag, y = cumulative_effect)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1,color=myred) +
  #geom_point(size = 2,color=myred) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_ci, ymax = upper_ci), color=NA,fill=myred,alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  #add 0 line
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
  labs(
    x = "Lag (negative = leads)",
    y = "Cumulative effect of maxwind_diff"
  )

lp_res <- lp_panel(
  data = data,
  outcome = "dths_tot_pop",
  main_var = "maxs",
  horizon = 300,
  fe = "stfips + month_state ",
   controls = "tavg:as.factor(stfips) + tavg^2:as.factor(stfips) +
    modate:as.factor(stfips) + modate^2:as.factor(stfips) + modate^3:as.factor(stfips) + modate^4:as.factor(stfips) +
    modate^5:as.factor(stfips) + modate^6:as.factor(stfips) + modate^7:as.factor(stfips) + modate^8:as.factor(stfips) ",
  panel_id = c("stfips", "month_year"),
  vcov_formula = "iid"
)
# Plot
ggplot(lp_res, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1,color=myred) +
  #geom_point(size = 2,color=myred) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), color=NA,fill=myred,alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  #add 0 line
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
  labs(
    x = "Lag (negative = leads)",
    y = "Cumulative effect of maxwind_diff"
  )

myblue  = "#1f78b4"   # blue
myred  = "#e31a1c"
myyellow = "orange"  # orange
myblack = "black"  # light blue
mygreen = "forestgreen"  # green

Data Barrage

make_shock <- function(
  data,
  var,
  p = 0.95,
  baseline_start = 1970,
  baseline_end   = 2014,
  controls = NULL,
  threshold_level = c("global", "country"),
  scale_var = FALSE,
  filter = NULL
) {

  threshold_level <- match.arg(threshold_level)

  data <- data %>% dplyr::mutate(.row_id = dplyr::row_number(), year = as.integer(year))

  if (!is.null(filter)) {
    data_filt <- data %>% dplyr::filter(!!filter)
    filter_suffix <- "_filter"
  } else {
    data_filt <- data
    filter_suffix <- ""
  }

  rhs <- if (!is.null(controls)) paste(controls) else "1"

  suffix_parts <- c()
  if (!is.null(controls)) suffix_parts <- c(suffix_parts, controls)
  if (threshold_level == "country") suffix_parts <- c(suffix_parts, "country")
  if (scale_var) suffix_parts <- c(suffix_parts, "varweight")

  suffix <- if (length(suffix_parts) > 0) {
    paste0("_", paste(suffix_parts, collapse = "_"))
  } else {
    ""
  }

  suffix <- paste0(suffix, filter_suffix)

  formula_fe <- as.formula(paste(var, "~", rhs, "| countrycode[year] + year"))
  fe_model <- feols(formula_fe, data = data_filt)

  shock_name         <- paste0(var, "_shock", suffix)
  treat_name         <- paste0(var, "_treat", suffix)
  treat_forever_name <- paste0(var, "_treat_forever", suffix)
  first_treat_name   <- paste0(var, "_first_treat_year", suffix)
  thresh_name        <- paste0(var, "_shock_p", suffix)

  resid_df <- data_filt %>%
    dplyr::select(.row_id) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(!!shock_name := resid(fe_model))

  data <- data %>%
    dplyr::left_join(resid_df, by = ".row_id")

  if (scale_var) {
    data <- data %>%
      dplyr::group_by(countrycode) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        !!shock_name := if_else(
          !is.na(.data[[shock_name]]),
          .data[[shock_name]] / sd(.data[[shock_name]], na.rm = TRUE),
          NA_real_
        )
      ) %>%
      dplyr::ungroup()
  }

  data_filt <- data %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data[[shock_name]]))

  if (threshold_level == "global") {
    global_thresh <- quantile(
      data_filt[[shock_name]][
        data_filt$year >= baseline_start &
        data_filt$year <= baseline_end
      ],
      p, na.rm = TRUE
    )
    data[[thresh_name]] <- global_thresh
  } else {
    data <- data %>%
      dplyr::group_by(countrycode) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        !!thresh_name := quantile(
          .data[[shock_name]][
            !is.na(.data[[shock_name]]) &
              .data$year >= baseline_start &
              .data$year <= baseline_end
          ],
          p, na.rm = TRUE
        )
      ) %>%
      dplyr::ungroup()
  }

  data <- data %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      !!treat_name         := NA_integer_,
      !!treat_forever_name := NA_integer_,
      !!first_treat_name   := NA_real_,
      !!thresh_name        := if_else(!is.na(.data[[shock_name]]), .data[[thresh_name]], NA_real_)
    )

  data <- data %>%
    dplyr::group_by(countrycode) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      !!treat_name := if_else(
        !is.na(.data[[shock_name]]) & !is.na(.data[[thresh_name]]),
        if_else(
          .data[[shock_name]] >= .data[[thresh_name]] & .data[[var]] > 0,
          1L, 0L
        ),
        NA_integer_
      ),
      !!first_treat_name := if_else(
        any(.data[[treat_name]] == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
        min(.data$year[!is.na(.data[[treat_name]]) & .data[[treat_name]] == 1], na.rm = TRUE),
        NA_real_
      ),
      !!treat_forever_name := if_else(
        !is.na(.data[[first_treat_name]]) & .data$year >= .data[[first_treat_name]],
        1L, 0L, missing = NA_integer_
      )
    ) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()

  data$.row_id <- NULL

  return(data)
}
pwt <- read_stata("raw data/pwt_clean.dta")
tcs <- read_stata("raw data/ibtracs_clean.dta")
wdi <- read_stata("raw data/wdi_clean_2018.dta")
data <- pwt %>% left_join(tcs, by = c("year", "countrycode")) %>%
  left_join(wdi, by = c("year", "countrycode"))
knot_to_ms = 0.514444
data$energy_sqkm <- data$sum_ann_energy_i_sqkm_nob %>% replace_na(0)
data$energy <- data$sum_ann_energy_i_nob %>% replace_na(0)
data$maxwind_knots <- data$max_ann_wind_i_nob %>% replace_na(0)
data$maxwind_sqkm_knots <- data$max_a_wind_i_sqkm_nob %>% replace_na(0)
data$maxwind <- data$max_ann_wind_i_nob %>% replace_na(0) * knot_to_ms
data$avgwind <- data$avg_ann_wind_i_nob %>% replace_na(0) * knot_to_ms
data$nlands <- data$sum_a_lands_nob %>% replace_na(0)
data$nlands_sqkm <- data$sum_a_lands_i_sqkm_nob %>% replace_na(0)
data$maxwind_sqkm <- data$max_a_wind_i_sqkm_nob %>% replace_na(0) * knot_to_ms
data %>%  arrange(countrycode, year) %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  mutate(
    hc_diff = hc - lag(hc),
    maxwind_sqkm_diff = maxwind_sqkm - lag(maxwind_sqkm),
    maxwind_diff = maxwind - lag(maxwind),
    nlands_diff = nlands - lag(nlands),
    l0_maxwind_p1 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 0),
    l0_maxwind_p2 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 0),
    l1_maxwind_p1 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 1),
    l1_maxwind_p2 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 1),
    l2_maxwind_p1 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 2),
    l2_maxwind_p2 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 2),
    l3_maxwind_p1 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 3),
    l3_maxwind_p2 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 3),
    l4_maxwind_p1 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 4),
    l4_maxwind_p2 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 4),
    l5_maxwind_p1 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 5),
    l5_maxwind_p2 = dplyr::lag(maxwind_diff, 5),
    l0_nlands_p1 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 0),
    l0_nlands_p2 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 0),
    l1_nlands_p1 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 1),
    l1_nlands_p2 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 1),
    l2_nlands_p1 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 2),
    l2_nlands_p2 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 2),
    l3_nlands_p1 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 3),
    l3_nlands_p2 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 3),
    l4_nlands_p1 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 4),
    l4_nlands_p2 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 4),
    l5_nlands_p1 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 5),
    l5_nlands_p2 = dplyr::lag(nlands_diff, 5)
    
    ) %>% 
  ungroup() -> data


data$continent <- countrycode(data$countrycode,
                                 origin = "iso3c",
                                 destination = "continent")

data_tc <- data %>%
  mutate(
    treat = as.integer(maxwind > 0),
    treatstorm = as.integer(maxwind >= 34),
    treathurricane = as.integer(maxwind >= 64),
    #create category factors for hurricances
    category = ifelse(maxwind < 18, "No Storm",
                      ifelse(maxwind >= 18 & maxwind < 33, "Tropical Storm",
                             ifelse(maxwind >= 33 & maxwind < 43, "Category 1",
                                    ifelse(maxwind >= 43 & maxwind < 50, "Category 2",
                                           ifelse(maxwind >= 50 & maxwind < 58, "Category 3",
                                                  ifelse(maxwind >= 58 & maxwind < 70, "Category 4",
                                                         "Category 5")))))),
    categorybin = ifelse(maxwind >= 49, "Category 3-5",
                           ifelse(maxwind >= 33 & maxwind < 49, "Category 1-2",
                                  ifelse(maxwind >= 18 & maxwind < 33, "Tropical Storm",
                                         "No Storm"))),
    
    loggdp = ln_real_gdp_usd_pc,
    gdp = real_gdp_usd_pc,
    gdp_diff = growth_real_gdp_usd_pc,
    year2 = year^2,
    year3 = year^3,
    year4 = year^4,
    maxwind1 = maxwind,
    maxwind2 = maxwind^2,
    maxwind3 = maxwind^3,
    maxwind_diff1 = maxwind_diff,
    maxwind_diff2 = maxwind_diff^2,
    maxwind_diff3 = maxwind_diff^3,
    nland_diff1 = nlands_diff,
    nland_diff2 = nlands_diff^2,
    nland_diff3 = nlands_diff^3,

    period = ifelse(year <= 1990, "Pre-1990", "Post-1990"),
    period90 = case_when(year <=1990 ~'Pre',
                        year >1990 ~'Post'),
     period91 = case_when(year <=1991 ~'Pre',
                        year >1991 ~'Post'),
    period89 = case_when(year <=1989 ~'Pre',
                        year >1989 ~'Post'),
    period92 = case_when(year <=1992 ~'Pre',
                        year >1992 ~'Post'),
    period88 = case_when(year <=1988 ~'Pre',
                        year >1988 ~'Post'),
    decade = case_when(
      year >= 1970 & year < 1980 ~ "1970s",
      year >= 1980 & year < 1990 ~ "1980s",
      year >= 1990 & year < 2000 ~ "1990s",
      year >= 2000 & year < 2010 ~ "2000s",
      year >= 2010 & year < 2020 ~ "2010s",
    ),
    period3 = case_when(
      year < 1985 ~ "1970-1984",
      year >= 1985 & year < 2000 ~ "1985-1999",
      year >= 2000 ~ "2000-2014"
    )
    
  ) %>% filter(year>=1969)

data_tc <- data_tc %>%
  # compute country-level averages over 2000–2010
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  mutate(
    credit_avg = mean(domestic_credit[year >= 2000 & year <= 2014], na.rm = TRUE),
    gdp_pc_avg = mean(real_gdp_usd_pc[year >= 2000 & year <= 2014], na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  # bin based on averages
  mutate(
    credit_bin = factor(
      ntile(credit_avg, 3),
      levels = 1:3,
      labels = c("q1", "q2", "q3")
    ),
    gdp_pc_bin = factor(
      ntile(gdp_pc_avg, 3),
      levels = 1:3,
      labels = c("bottom 1/3", "middle", "top 1/3")
    ),
    # create deciles for GDP per capita
    gdp_pc_decile = ntile(gdp_pc_avg, 5),
    gdp_pc_group = case_when(
      gdp_pc_decile == 1 ~ "bottom 1/5",
      gdp_pc_decile == 5 ~ "top 1/5",
      TRUE ~ "middle"
    )
  )

######### SHOCKs

data_tc <- data_tc %>%
  #group_by(countrycode) %>%
  
  # Compute country-specific 95th percentiles over 1970-1990
  mutate(
    maxwind_p95 = quantile(maxwind[year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    nlands_p95  = quantile(nlands[year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    energy_p95  = quantile(energy[year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    maxwind_sqkm_p95 = quantile(maxwind_sqkm[year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    nlands_sqkm_p95  = quantile(nlands_sqkm[year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    energy_sqkm_p95  = quantile(energy_sqkm[year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    maxwind_p90 = quantile(maxwind[year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.90, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  # Build indicators, but only assign 1 if percentile > 0
  mutate(
    maxwind_95      = as.integer(maxwind_p95 > 0 & maxwind      >= maxwind_p95),
    nlands_95       = as.integer(nlands_p95  > 0 & nlands       >= nlands_p95),
    energy_95       = as.integer(energy_p95  > 0 & energy       >= energy_p95),
    maxwind_sqkm_95 = as.integer(maxwind_sqkm_p95 > 0 & maxwind_sqkm >= maxwind_sqkm_p95),
    nlands_sqkm_95  = as.integer(nlands_sqkm_p95  > 0 & nlands_sqkm  >= nlands_sqkm_p95),
    energy_sqkm_95  = as.integer(energy_sqkm_p95  > 0 & energy_sqkm  >= energy_sqkm_p95),
    maxwind_90      = as.integer(maxwind_p90 > 0 & maxwind >= maxwind_p90),
    # Physical thresholds
    wind_10ms = as.integer(maxwind >= 10),
    wind_21ms = as.integer(maxwind >= 21),
    wind_ts = as.integer(maxwind >= 18),
    wind_cat1 = as.integer(maxwind >= 33),
    wind_cat2 = as.integer(maxwind >= 43),
    wind_cat3 = as.integer(maxwind >= 50)
  )




data_tc <- data_tc %>%
  make_shock("maxwind") %>%
  make_shock("maxwind", scale_var = TRUE) %>%
  make_shock("maxwind", threshold_level = "country") %>%
  make_shock("maxwind_sqkm") %>%
  make_shock("maxwind_sqkm", scale_var = TRUE) %>%
  make_shock("maxwind_sqkm", threshold_level = "country") %>%
  make_shock("energy") %>%
  make_shock("energy_sqkm") %>%
  make_shock("nlands") %>%
  make_shock("nlands_sqkm") %>% 
  make_shock("maxwind", filter = rlang::expr(year >= 1979)) %>% 
  make_shock("maxwind", filter = rlang::expr(year >= 1979), scale_var = TRUE) %>% 
  make_shock("maxwind", filter = rlang::expr(year >= 1979), threshold_level = "country")





# add tfp
alpha <- 0.33
data_tc <- data_tc %>%
  mutate(
    ln_hc          = log(hc),
    ln_rkna        = log(rkna),
    ln_pop         = log(pop),
    ln_real_gdp_usd = log(real_gdp_usd),
    ln_tfp  = ln_real_gdp_usd - (alpha * ln_rkna) - (1 - alpha) * (ln_hc + ln_pop)
  )

data_tc <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  arrange(year) %>%
  mutate(
    maxwind_treat_past3 = sapply(seq_along(year), function(i) {
      any(maxwind_treat[max(1, i-3):(i-1)] == 1)
    }) %>% as.integer(),
    maxwind_treat_past5 = sapply(seq_along(year), function(i) {
      any(maxwind_treat[max(1, i-5):(i-1)] == 1)
    }) %>% as.integer(),
    maxwind_treat_past2 = sapply(seq_along(year), function(i) {
      any(maxwind_treat[max(1, i-2):(i-1)] == 1)
    }) %>% as.integer(),
    maxwind_treat_past7 = sapply(seq_along(year), function(i) {
      any(maxwind_treat[max(1, i-7):(i-1)] == 1)
    }) %>% as.integer(),
    maxwind_treat_past10 = sapply(seq_along(year), function(i) {
      any(maxwind_treat[max(1, i-10):(i-1)] == 1)
    }) %>% as.integer(),
    maxwind_treat_past15 = sapply(seq_along(year), function(i) {
      any(maxwind_treat[max(1, i-15):(i-1)] == 1)
    }) %>% as.integer(),
    maxwind_treat_past20 = sapply(seq_along(year), function(i) {
      any(maxwind_treat[max(1, i-20):(i-1)] == 1)
    }) %>% as.integer()
    
  ) %>%
  ungroup()


data_tc <- data_tc %>%
  arrange(countrycode, year) %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  mutate(
    prev_treat_year = ifelse(maxwind_treat == 1, year, NA_integer_),
    prev_treat_year = zoo::na.locf(prev_treat_year, na.rm = FALSE),
    prev_treat_year = lag(prev_treat_year),   # force "previous", not current
    time_to_last = ifelse(
      maxwind_treat == 1 & !is.na(prev_treat_year),
      year - prev_treat_year,
      0L),
    ttl_bin = case_when(
      time_to_last == 0 ~ "No past shock",
      time_to_last > 0 & time_to_last <= 3 ~ "1-3",
      time_to_last > 3 & time_to_last <= 5 ~ "3-5",
      time_to_last > 5 & time_to_last <= 7 ~ "5-7",
      time_to_last > 7 & time_to_last <= 10 ~ "7-10",
      time_to_last > 10 & time_to_last <= 15 ~ "10-15",
       time_to_last > 15 & time_to_last <= 20 ~ "15-20",
      time_to_last > 20 ~ "20+"
    ),
      ttl_bin2 = case_when(
      time_to_last == 0 ~ "No past shock",
      time_to_last > 0 & time_to_last <= 5 ~ "1-5",
      time_to_last > 5 & time_to_last <= 10 ~ "5-10",
      time_to_last > 10 & time_to_last <= 15 ~ "10-15",
       time_to_last > 15 & time_to_last <= 20 ~ "15-20",
      time_to_last > 20 ~ "20+"
     ),
      ttl_bin3 = case_when(
      time_to_last == 0 ~ "No past shock",
      time_to_last > 0 & time_to_last <= 5 ~ "1-5",
      time_to_last > 5 & time_to_last <= 10 ~ "5-10",
      time_to_last > 10 ~ "10+"
     ),
    ttl_bin5 = case_when(
      time_to_last == 0 ~ "No past shock",
      time_to_last > 0 & time_to_last <= 5 ~ "1-5",
      time_to_last > 5 & time_to_last <= 10 ~ "5-10",
      time_to_last > 10 & time_to_last <= 15 ~ "10-15",
       time_to_last > 15 & time_to_last <= 20 ~ "15-20",
      time_to_last > 20 & time_to_last <= 25 ~ "20-25",
      time_to_last > 25 ~ "25+"
     )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

B&B2025 replication

m1 <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ nlands_sqkm| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>1969),
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)
m2 <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ nlands_sqkm*domestic_credit| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>1969),
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

m3 <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ nlands_sqkm*l(ln_real_gdp_usd_pc,1)| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc,
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

m4 <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ maxwind_sqkm_knots| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>1969),
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)
m5 <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ maxwind_sqkm_knots*domestic_credit| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>1969),
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

m6 <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ maxwind_sqkm_knots*l(ln_real_gdp_usd_pc,1)| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc,
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

etable(m1, m2,m3, m4, m5, m6, replace=TRUE,
       digits=3, dict = c("nlands_sqkm" = "Landfalls (sqkm)",
                "maxwind_sqkm_knots" = "Max Wind (sqkm)",
                "domestic_credit" = "Domestic Credit",
                "l(ln_real_gdp_usd_pc,1)" = "Lagged GDP per Capita"),
       fitstat = c("n", "ar2"), tex = TRUE, file = "tables/bb2025_replication_tab1.tex")
etable(m1, m2,m3, m4, m5, m6,
       fitstat = c("n", "ar2"))

m1 <- feols(
  gdp_diff*100 ~ l(maxwind_shock,0:5)| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc,
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

m2 <- feols(
  gdp_diff*100 ~ l(maxwind_shock_filter,0:5)| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc,
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

etable(m1, m2)
years <- sort(unique(data_tc$year))

vars <- c("nlands_sqkm", 
          "maxwind_sqkm",
          "nlands", "maxwind",
          "maxwind_sqkm_treat", "maxwind_treat",
          "maxwind_shock", "maxwind_shock_filter")

run_loyo <- function(varname) {
  
  formula_full <- as.formula(
    paste0("gdp_diff ~ ", varname, 
           " | year + countrycode[year]")
  )
  
  # Full sample model
  m_full <- feols(
    formula_full,
    data = data_tc,
    panel.id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    cluster = ~countrycode
  )
  
  full_beta <- coef(m_full)[varname]
  full_se   <- se(m_full)[varname]
  
  full_ci_low  <- full_beta - 1.96 * full_se
  full_ci_high <- full_beta + 1.96 * full_se
  
  # LOYO coefficients only
  loyo <- map_dfr(years, function(y_drop) {
    
    m <- feols(
      formula_full,
      data = data_tc %>% filter(year != y_drop),
      panel.id = c("countrycode", "year"),
      cluster = ~countrycode
    )
    
    tibble(
      variable = varname,
      dropped_year = y_drop,
      beta = coef(m)[varname]
    )
  })
  
  # Add constant full-sample info
  loyo %>%
    mutate(
      full_beta = full_beta,
      full_ci_low = full_ci_low,
      full_ci_high = full_ci_high
    )
}

loyo_results <- map_dfr(vars, run_loyo)
loyo_results <- loyo_results %>%
  mutate(
    within_ci = beta >= full_ci_low & beta <= full_ci_high
  )


ggplot(loyo_results, 
       aes(x = dropped_year, y = beta)) +
  
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = full_ci_low, ymax = full_ci_high),
              alpha = 0.2) +
  
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 1.8) +
  
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = full_beta),
             linetype = "dashed", 
             color = "red") +
  
  facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free_y") +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  #add dash at 1980
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1980, linetype = "dashed", color = "blue") +
  
  labs(
    title = "Leave-One-Year-Out Sensitivity",
    x = "Dropped Year",
    y = "Coefficient"
  )

run_loco <- function(varname) {
  
  formula_full <- as.formula(
    paste0("gdp_diff ~ ", varname, 
           " | year + countrycode[year]")
  )
  
  # ----- Full sample model -----
  m_full <- feols(
    formula_full,
    data = data_tc,
    panel.id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    cluster = ~countrycode
  )
  
  full_beta <- coef(m_full)[varname]
  full_se   <- se(m_full)[varname]
  
  full_ci_low  <- full_beta - 1.96 * full_se
  full_ci_high <- full_beta + 1.96 * full_se
  
  # ----- Leave-one-country-out -----
  loco <- map_dfr(countries, function(cc_drop) {
    
    m <- feols(
      formula_full,
      data = data_tc %>% filter(countrycode != cc_drop),
      panel.id = c("countrycode", "year"),
      cluster = ~countrycode
    )
    
    tibble(
      variable = varname,
      dropped_country = cc_drop,
      beta = coef(m)[varname]
    )
  })
  
  loco %>%
    mutate(
      full_beta = full_beta,
      full_ci_low = full_ci_low,
      full_ci_high = full_ci_high
    )
}

countries <- unique(data_tc$countrycode)
loco_results <- map_dfr(vars, run_loco)
#add if beta is within full ci
loco_results <- loco_results %>%
  mutate(
    within_ci = beta >= full_ci_low & beta <= full_ci_high
  )

ggplot(loco_results, 
       aes(x = dropped_country, y = beta)) +
  
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = full_ci_low, ymax = full_ci_high),
              alpha = 0.2) +
  
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 1.8) +
  
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = full_beta),
             linetype = "dashed", 
             color = "red") +
  
  facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free_y") +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Leave-One-Country-Out Sensitivity",
    x = "Dropped Country",
    y = "Coefficient"
  )
m1 <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ nlands_sqkm| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>1979),
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)
m2 <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ nlands_sqkm*domestic_credit| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>1979),
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

m3 <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ nlands_sqkm*l(ln_real_gdp_usd_pc,1)| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc,
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

m4 <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ maxwind_sqkm_knots| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>1979),
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)
m5 <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ maxwind_sqkm_knots*domestic_credit| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>1979),
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

m6 <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ maxwind_sqkm_knots*l(ln_real_gdp_usd_pc,1)| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc,
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

etable(m1, m2,m3, m4, m5, m6, replace=TRUE,
       digits=3, dict = c("nlands_sqkm" = "Landfalls (sqkm)",
                "maxwind_sqkm_knots" = "Max Wind (sqkm)",
                "domestic_credit" = "Domestic Credit",
                "l(ln_real_gdp_usd_pc,1)" = "Lagged GDP per Capita"),
       fitstat = c("n", "ar2"), tex = TRUE, file = "tables/bb2025_tab1_post80.tex")
etable(m1, m2,m3, m4, m5, m6,
       fitstat = c("n", "ar2"))

DIAGNOSTICS

years  <- sort(unique(data_tc$year))

shocks <- c("maxwind_shock", "maxwind_shock_filter", 
            "maxwind_treat", "maxwind_treat_filter")
irfs_loyo <- map_dfr(years, function(y) {
  
  data_loo <- data_tc %>% filter(year != y)
  
  map_dfr(shocks, function(shk) {
    
    lp_panel(
      data        = data_loo,
      outcome     = "loggdp",
      main_var    = shk,
      horizon     = 10,
      controls    = "l(gdp_diff,1:2)",
      fe          = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
      panel_id    = c("countrycode", "year"),
      vcov_formula = DK ~ year
    ) %>%
      mutate(
        shock   = shk,
        loo_year = y
      )
  })
})

#add main sample estimate
irfs_full <- map_dfr(shocks, function(shk) {
  lp_panel(
    data        = data_tc,
    outcome     = "loggdp",
    main_var    = shk,
    horizon     = 10,
    controls    = "l(gdp_diff,1:2)",
    fe          = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
    panel_id    = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year
  ) %>%
    mutate(
      shock   = shk,
      loo_year = "Full Sample"
    )
})


ggplot(irfs_loyo, aes(horizon, irf_mean, group = loo_year)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_line(data = irfs_full, aes(horizon, irf_mean), color = "cornflowerblue", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_ribbon(data = irfs_full, aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), fill = "cornflowerblue", alpha = 0.15) +
  facet_wrap(~ shock, scales = "free_y") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon",
    y = "IRF",
    title = "Leave-One-Year-Out"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 0.01))
countries  <- sort(unique(data_tc$countrycode))
shocks <- c("maxwind_shock", "maxwind_shock_filter", 
            "maxwind_treat", "maxwind_treat_filter")
irfs_loco <- map_dfr(countries, function(cc) {
  
  data_loco <- data_tc %>% filter(countrycode != cc)
  
  map_dfr(shocks, function(shk) {
    
    lp_panel(
      data        = data_loco,
      outcome     = "loggdp",
      main_var    = shk,
      horizon     = 10,
      controls    = "l(gdp_diff,1:2)",
      fe          = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
      panel_id    = c("countrycode", "year"),
      vcov_formula = DK ~ year
    ) %>%
      mutate(
        shock   = shk,
        loco_country = cc
      )
  })
})

#add main sample estimate
irfs_full <- map_dfr(shocks, function(shk) {
  lp_panel(
    data        = data_tc,
    outcome     = "loggdp",
    main_var    = shk,
    horizon     = 10,
    controls    = "l(gdp_diff,1:2)",
    fe          = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
    panel_id    = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year
  ) %>%
    mutate(
      shock   = shk,
      loco_country = "Full Sample")
})

ggplot(irfs_loco, aes(horizon, irf_mean, group = loco_country)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_line(data = irfs_full, aes(horizon, irf_mean), color = "cornflowerblue", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_ribbon(data = irfs_full, aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), fill = "cornflowerblue", alpha = 0.15) +
  facet_wrap(~ shock, scales = "free_y") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon",
    y = "IRF",
    title = "Leave-One-Country-Out"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 0.01))

data_tc <- data_tc%>%
  mutate(
    year_block = paste0(
      floor((year - 1969) / 5) * 5 + 1969,
      "-",
      floor((year - 1969) / 5) * 5 + 1973
    )
  )

blocks <- sort(unique(data_tc$year_block))

shocks <- c(
  "maxwind_shock", "maxwind_shock_filter",
  "maxwind_treat", "maxwind_treat_filter"
)

irfs_lobo <- map_dfr(blocks, function(bk) {
  
  data_lobo <- data_tc %>% filter(year_block != bk)
  
  map_dfr(shocks, function(shk) {
    
    lp_panel(
      data         = data_lobo,
      outcome      = "loggdp",
      main_var     = shk,
      horizon      = 10,
      controls     = "l(gdp_diff,1:2)",
      fe           = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
      panel_id     = c("countrycode", "year"),
      vcov_formula = DK ~ year
    ) %>%
      mutate(
        shock       = shk,
        left_block  = bk
      )
  })
})
[WARNING] Deprecated: --no-highlight. Use --syntax-highlighting=none instead.
#add main sample estimate
irfs_full <- map_dfr(shocks, function(shk) {
  lp_panel(
    data         = data_tc,
    outcome      = "loggdp",
    main_var     = shk,
    horizon      = 10,
    controls     = "l(gdp_diff,1:2)",
    fe           = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
    panel_id     = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year
  ) %>%
    mutate(
      shock       = shk,
      left_block  = "Full Sample"
    )
})

ggplot(irfs_lobo, aes(horizon, irf_mean, group = left_block)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.15) +
  
  geom_line(
    data = irfs_full,
    aes(horizon, irf_mean),
    color = "cornflowerblue",
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    data = irfs_full,
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    fill = "cornflowerblue",
    alpha = 0.15
  ) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, scales = "free_y") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon",
    y = "IRF",
    title = "Leave-One-5-Year-Period-Out IRFs"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 0.01))

m1 <- feols(
  loggdp - l(loggdp,1) ~ maxwind_shock_filter| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>=1978),
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

m2 <- feols(
  loggdp - l(loggdp,1) ~ maxwind_shock_filter| year + countrycode[year],
  data = data_tc,
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)

etable(m1, m2)
                                     m1                 m2
Dependent Var.:      loggdp-l(loggdp,1) loggdp-l(loggdp,1)
                                                          
maxwind_shock_filter   -0.0001 (0.0001)   -0.0001 (0.0001)
Fixed-Effects:       ------------------ ------------------
year                                Yes                Yes
countrycode                         Yes                Yes
Varying Slopes:      ------------------ ------------------
year (countrycode)                  Yes                Yes
____________________ __________________ __________________
S.E.: Clustered         by: countrycode    by: countrycode
Observations                      6,211              6,211
R2                              0.22204            0.22204
Within R2                       0.00016            0.00016
---
Signif. codes: 0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
sample_periods <- list(
  "1970-2008" = 1969:2008,
  "1995-2014" = 1994:2014,
  "1990-2014" = 1989:2014,
  "2000-2014" = 1999:2014
)

shocks <- c("maxwind", "maxwind_shock", 
            "maxwind_treat", "maxwind_shock_filter",
            "wind_cat1")

irfs_sub <- map_dfr(names(sample_periods), function(period_name) {
  
  years_range <- sample_periods[[period_name]]
  data_sub <- data_tc %>% filter(year %in% years_range)
  
  map_dfr(shocks, function(shk) {
    lp_panel(
      data        = data_sub,
      outcome     = "loggdp",
      main_var    = shk,
      horizon     = 10,
      controls    = "l(gdp_diff,1:2) ",
      fe          = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
      panel_id    = c("countrycode", "year"),
      vcov_formula = DK ~ year
    ) %>%
      mutate(
        shock  = shk,
        period = period_name
      )
  })
})

irfs_full <- map_dfr(shocks, function(shk) {
  lp_panel(
    data        = data_tc,
    outcome     = "loggdp",
    main_var    = shk,
    horizon     = 10,
    controls    = "l(gdp_diff,1:2)",
    fe          = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
    panel_id    = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year
  ) %>%
    mutate(
      shock  = shk,
      period = "Full Sample"
    )
})

ggplot(irfs_sub, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = period)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_line(data = irfs_full, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean),
            color = "black", linewidth = 1, linetype="dashed") +
  geom_ribbon(data = irfs_full, aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
              fill = "dodgerblue", alpha = 0.1, color = NA) +
  facet_wrap(~ shock, scales = "free_y") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(accuracy = 0.01)) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon",
    y = "IRF",
    color = "Sample Period",
    title = "IRFs Across Different Sample Periods"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

NA
NA

ANALYSES

model_main <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ 
                l0_maxwind_p1 + l0_maxwind_p2 + l1_maxwind_p1 + l1_maxwind_p2  + l2_maxwind_p1 + l2_maxwind_p2 +
    l3_maxwind_p1 + l3_maxwind_p2 + l4_maxwind_p1 + l4_maxwind_p2 + l5_maxwind_p1 + l5_maxwind_p2
                       | countrycode[year] + year  + countrycode[year2]
                  , 
  data = data_tc, 
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year")
)


max_avg_gst <- 40
min_avg_gst <- 0
rf_main <- useful::predict_poly_sum_lags(model_main,
                           xvar_name = "wind", var = "maxwind", max= max_avg_gst, min= min_avg_gst, ref=0)

ggplot(rf_main, aes(x = wind, y = response)) +
  geom_line(color='cornflowerblue',linewidth=1) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.2, fill = "dodgerblue") +
  #add 0 reference line
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  theme_classic()

FE-DL

irfs_wind_cumulative <- cumulative_dl(
  data = data_tc,
  outcome = "gdp_diff",
  main_var = "maxwind",
  lags = 0:20,
  fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
  panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year,
  shock_label = "Maximum Wind Speed Treatment"
)

ggplot(irfs_wind_cumulative, aes(x = lag, y = cumulative_effect)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_ci, ymax = upper_ci),
              fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  labs(
    x = "Years after shock",
    y = "Cumulative effect",
    title = "Cumulative Distributed Lag Effects"
  )
results_list <- list()

lag_specs <- list(
  "5 lags" = 0:5,
  "10 lags" = 0:10,
  "15 lags" = 0:15,
  "20 lags" = 0:20
)

for (spec_name in names(lag_specs)) {
  results_list[[spec_name]] <- cumulative_dl(
    data = data_tc,
    outcome = "gdp_diff",
    main_var = "maxwind_treat",
    lags = lag_specs[[spec_name]],
    fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
    panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year,
    shock_label = spec_name
  )
}

# Combine all results
all_results <- bind_rows(results_list, .id = "specification")

# Plot with different specifications
ggplot(all_results, aes(x = lag, y = cumulative_effect, 
                        color = specification, fill = specification)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_ci, ymax = upper_ci), 
              alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  labs(
    x = "Years after shock",
    y = "Cumulative effect on GDP growth",
    title = "Robustness to Lag Length Specification",
    color = "Specification",
    fill = "Specification"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

results_continent <- cumulative_dl_interact(
  data = data_tc,
  outcome = "gdp_diff",
  main_var = "maxwind_treat",
  interact_var = "period",
  lags = 0:10,
  fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
  panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year
)

# Plot
ggplot(results_continent, aes(x = lag, y = cumulative_effect, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_ci, ymax = upper_ci), 
              alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(legend.position = "top") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100*x, "%")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(myred, myblue,myyellow,myblack,mygreen)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(myred, myblue,myyellow,myblack,mygreen)) +
  labs(
    x = "Years after shock",
    y = " GDP growth"
  ) +
  #add 0 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7)
ggsave("figures/irf_DL_interact_period.png", width = 5, height = 5)

Treatment Analysis


events <- tribble(
  ~countrycode, ~year, ~label,
  "USA", 2005, "Katrina",
  "USA", 1992, "Andrew",
  "PHL", 2013, "Haiyan",
  "DOM", 1979, "David",
  "JPN", 1971, "Olive"
)

countries_keep <- c("USA", "JPN", "PHL", "DOM")

df_plot <- data_tc %>%
  filter(countrycode %in% countries_keep & year >1969)

#print the top 3 max shock for each country and the year it occurred
tab <- df_plot %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = maxwind_shock, n = 3) %>%
  select(countrycode, year, maxwind_shock) %>%
  arrange(countrycode, desc(maxwind_shock))
print(tab)

ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = year, y = maxwind_shock)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue",linewidth=1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  
  # vertical hurricane markers
  geom_vline(
    data = events,
    aes(xintercept = year),
    color = "firebrick",
    linetype = "dashed",
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  
  # optional labels
  geom_text(
    data = events,
    aes(x = year, y = Inf, label = label),
    angle = 0,
    vjust = 1.1,
    hjust = 0.8,
    color = "firebrick",
    size = 3
  ) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ countrycode, scales = "free_y",ncol=2) +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Max wind shock"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) 

plot_event_series <- function(data, var, ylab) {
  
  df <- data %>%
    group_by(year) %>%
    summarise(
      avg = sum(.data[[var]], na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  # Fit linear trend
  fit <- lm(avg ~ year, data = df)
  slope <- coef(fit)[2]
  
  slope_label <- paste0(
    ifelse(slope >= 0, "+", ""),
    round(slope, 2),
    " events / year"
  )
  
  ggplot(df, aes(x = year, y = avg)) +
    
    # main series
    geom_line(color = myblue, linewidth = 1.2) +
    
    # linear trend
    geom_smooth(
      method = "lm",
      se = FALSE,
      color = "indianred",
      linetype = "dashed",
      linewidth = 1.1
    ) +
    
    # slope annotation
    annotate(
      "text",
      x = min(df$year) + 0.05 * diff(range(df$year)),
      y = max(df$avg, na.rm = TRUE),
      label = slope_label,
      color = "indianred",
      hjust = 0,
      vjust = 1,
      size = 5,
      fontface = "bold"
    ) +
    
    labs(
      x = "",
      y = ylab
    ) +
    
    # integer y-axis
    scale_y_continuous(
      breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 6),
      labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 1)
    ) +
    
    theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
    theme(
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.text  = element_text(color = "black")
    )
}

plot_event_series(
  data_tc %>% filter(year >= 1970),
  var  = "maxwind_95",
  ylab = "# of 1-in-20 year wind events"
)
ggsave("figures/event_series_maxwind_95.png", dpi = 300)
plot_event_series(
  data_tc %>% filter(year >= 1970),
  var  = "maxwind_treat",
  ylab = "# of 1-in-20 year wind events (residualized)"
)
ggsave("figures/event_series_maxwind_treat.png", dpi = 300)

plot_event_series(
  data_tc %>% filter(year >= 1980),
  var  = "maxwind_treat_filter",
  ylab = "# of 1-in-20 year wind events (residualized)"
)
ggsave("figures/event_series_maxwind_treat_post80.png", dpi = 300)

plot_event_series(
  data_tc,
  var  = "maxwind_sqkm_treat",
  ylab = "# of 1-in-20 year wind/sqkm events (res.)"
)

plot_event_series(
  data_tc,
  var  = "maxwind_sqkm_treat_country",
  ylab = "# of 1-in-20 year wind/sqkm events (res.)"
)

plot_event_series(
  data_tc,
  var  = "maxwind_sqkm_treat_varweight",
  ylab = "# of 1-in-20 year wind/sqkm events (res.)"
)

data_plot <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  filter(any(maxwind_treat > 0, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%  # only ever treated
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(maxwind_treat > 0) %>%                     # only event years
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  mutate(
    first_event = min(year),
    n_events    = n()
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(desc(n_events), first_event) %>%
  mutate(countrycode = factor(countrycode,
                              levels = rev(unique(countrycode))))

# -----------------------------
# 2. RHS labels
# -----------------------------
label_df <- data_plot %>%
  distinct(countrycode, n_events)

max_year <- max(data_plot$year, na.rm = TRUE)
label_x  <- max_year + 2

# -----------------------------
# 3. Split countries into top/bottom halves
# -----------------------------
country_levels <- levels(data_plot$countrycode)
n_countries    <- length(country_levels)
half_point     <- ceiling(n_countries / 2)

top_half       <- country_levels[1:half_point]
bottom_half    <- country_levels[(half_point + 1):n_countries]

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  mutate(panel = ifelse(countrycode %in% top_half, "Top", "Bottom"))

label_df <- label_df %>%
  mutate(panel = ifelse(countrycode %in% top_half, "Top", "Bottom"))

# -----------------------------
# 4. Plot
# -----------------------------
ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = year, y = countrycode)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +

  # Event count column
  geom_text(
    data = label_df,
    aes(x = label_x, y = countrycode,
        label = n_events),
    hjust = 0,
    size = 3.5,
    color = "firebrick4",
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +

  # Facet top/bottom halves
  facet_wrap(~ panel, ncol = 2, scales = "free_y") +

  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.03, 0.20))) +

  labs(x = "Year", y = "Country") +

  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(5.5, 40, 5.5, 5.5)
  )
ggsave("figures/event_timeline.png", dpi = 300)

  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  mutate(
