data_tc_filtered <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  filter(max(maxwind, na.rm = TRUE) > 0 | max(nlands, na.rm = TRUE) > 0) %>%
  ungroup()

map_data <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
  left_join(
    data_tc_filtered %>%
      group_by(countrycode) %>%
      summarise(events = sum(maxwind_treat, na.rm = TRUE)),
    by = c("iso_a3" = "countrycode")
  )

ggplot(map_data) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = events), color = "white", linewidth = 0.1) +
  
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = c (RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9, "YlOrRd")),
    limits = c(1, max(map_data$events, na.rm = TRUE)),
    breaks = pretty_breaks(n = 5),
    labels = label_number(accuracy = 1),
    na.value = "grey90",
    name = "# events"
  ) +
  
  coord_sf(expand = FALSE) +
  #robinson 
  coord_sf(crs = "+proj=robin") +
   theme_void() +
      theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )

ggsave("figures/map_events95p.png", width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)


# Example: fully independent control for each arrow/text
highlight_events <- tribble(
  ~countrycode, ~year, ~label, ~arrow_start_y, ~arrow_end_y, ~label_y, ~arrow_color, ~arrow_size, ~label_color, ~label_hjust,
  "USA", 2005, "USA 2005", 240, 20, 250, "dodgerblue", 1, "dodgerblue", -0.,
  "PHL", 2013, "PHL 2013", 250, 20, 280, "dodgerblue", 1, "dodgerblue", 0.5,
  "JPN", 1976, "JPN 1976", 200, 20, 230, "dodgerblue", 1, "dodgerblue", 0.6
) %>%
  left_join(data_tc %>% select(countrycode, year, maxwind_shock),
            by = c("countrycode", "year"))

# Plot
ggplot(data_tc, aes(x = maxwind_shock)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.1, fill = myblue, color = "black", alpha = 0.7) +
  
  labs(x = "Maximum Wind Speed Shock", y = "Frequency") +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text  = element_text(color = "black")
  ) +
  
  # Fully independent arrows
  geom_segment(data = highlight_events,
               aes(
                 x = maxwind_shock, xend = maxwind_shock,
                 y = arrow_start_y, yend = arrow_end_y,
                 color = arrow_color,
                 size = arrow_size
               ),
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.25, "cm"))
  ) +
  scale_color_identity() +   # so the colors from the table are used directly
  scale_size_identity() +    # so sizes from the table are used directly

  # Fully independent labels
  geom_text(data = highlight_events,
            aes(
              x = maxwind_shock,
              y = label_y,
              label = label,
              color = label_color,
              hjust = label_hjust
            ),
            fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  scale_color_identity()
ggsave("figures/histogram_shock_events.png", width = 5, height = 5, dpi = 300)

#correlation between treatment and maxwind
ggplot(data_tc, aes(x = maxwind, y = maxwind_shock)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(x = "Max Wind Speed", y = "Max Wind Speed Shock") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  #display r and p 
  annotate("text", x = 1, y = 40, label = paste0("r = ", round(cor(data_tc$maxwind, data_tc$maxwind_shock, use = "complete.obs"), 2)), hjust = 0, size=5) 
ggsave("figures/correlation_shock_maxwind.png", width = 5, height = 5, dpi = 300)
countries_plot <- c("USA", "JPN", "PHL", "MOZ", "CAN", "AUS")

df_plot <- data_tc %>%
  filter(countrycode %in% countries_plot)

make_country_plot <- function(cty) {
  
  df_cty <- df_plot %>% filter(countrycode == cty)
  
  shock_max <- max(abs(df_cty$maxwind_shock), na.rm = TRUE)
  wind_max  <- max(df_cty$maxwind, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  scale_factor <- 1 * wind_max / shock_max
  
  ggplot(df_cty, aes(x = year)) +
    
    # Shock bars (left axis)
    geom_col(aes(y = maxwind_shock),
             fill = "firebrick",
             alpha = 0.6) +
    
    # Raw windspeed (right axis, rescaled)
    geom_line(aes(y = maxwind / scale_factor),
              color = "steelblue",
              linewidth = 1) +
    
    scale_y_continuous(
      name = "Shock",
      limits = c(-shock_max, shock_max),  # symmetric shock axis
      sec.axis = sec_axis(
        trans = ~ . * scale_factor,
        name = "Max Wind",
        breaks = seq(0, ceiling(wind_max), by = 20)
      )
    ) +
    
    labs(title = cty, x = NULL) +
    
    theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y.left  = element_text(color = "firebrick"),
      axis.title.y.right = element_text(color = "steelblue")
    )
}

p <- lapply(countries_plot, make_country_plot)

wrap_plots(p, ncol = 2)
ggsave("figures/shock_wind_comparison.png", dpi = 300)

countries_plot <- c("USA", "JPN", "PHL", "MOZ", "CAN", "AUS")

df_plot <- data_tc %>%
  filter(countrycode %in% countries_plot)

make_country_plot <- function(cty) {
  
  df_cty <- df_plot %>% filter(countrycode == cty)
  
  shock_max <- max(abs(df_cty$maxwind_sqkm_shock), na.rm = TRUE)
  wind_max  <- max(df_cty$maxwind_sqkm_shock, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  scale_factor <- 0.5 * wind_max / shock_max
  
  ggplot(df_cty, aes(x = year)) +
    
    # Shock bars (left axis)
    geom_col(aes(y = maxwind_sqkm_shock),
             fill = "firebrick",
             alpha = 0.6) +
    
    # Raw windspeed (right axis, rescaled)
    geom_line(aes(y = maxwind_sqkm / scale_factor),
              color = "steelblue",
              linewidth = 1) +
    
    scale_y_continuous(
      name = "Shock",
      limits = c(-shock_max, shock_max),  # symmetric shock axis
      sec.axis = sec_axis(
        trans = ~ . * scale_factor,
        name = "Max Wind",
        breaks = seq(0, ceiling(wind_max), by = 20)
      )
    ) +
    
    labs(title = cty, x = NULL) +
    
    theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y.left  = element_text(color = "firebrick"),
      axis.title.y.right = element_text(color = "steelblue")
    )
}

p <- lapply(countries_plot, make_country_plot)

wrap_plots(p, ncol = 2)
#print year of max wind for each country
data_tc %>%
  filter(maxwind > 0) %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  summarise(
    maxwind_year = year[which.max(maxwind_shock)],
    maxwind_sqkm_year = year[which.max(maxwind_sqkm_shock)],
    maxwind_shock      = max(maxwind_shock, na.rm = TRUE),
    maxwind_sqkm_shock = 1000*max(maxwind_sqkm_shock, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(maxwind_sqkm_shock))
top15 <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  summarise(avg_maxwind = mean(maxwind, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(desc(avg_maxwind)) %>%
  slice(1:15)

data_plot <- data_tc %>%
  filter(countrycode %in% top15$countrycode) %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_maxwind = mean(maxwind, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_events    = sum(maxwind_treat == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(avg_maxwind)) %>%
  mutate(countrycode = factor(countrycode,
                              levels = rev(countrycode)))

p1 <- ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = n_events, y = countrycode)) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = n_events,
                   y = countrycode, yend = countrycode),
               color = "steelblue",
               linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_point(size = 3, color = "steelblue") +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = NULL,
    title = "Number of Events"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))


p2 <- ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = avg_maxwind, y = countrycode)) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = avg_maxwind,
                   y = countrycode, yend = countrycode),
               color = "firebrick",
               linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_point(size = 3, color = "firebrick") +
  labs(
    x = "m/s",
    y = NULL,
    title = "Max Wind (average 1970-2014)"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))

p2 + p1 + plot_layout(ncol = 2)
ggsave("figures/top15_countries.png", width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
treatments <- c("maxwind_shock", "maxwind_shock_varweight")
irfs <- list()
for (treat in treatments) {

  irf <- lp_panel(
    data = data_tc,
    outcome = "maxwind",
    main_var = treat,
    horizon = 10,
    fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
    panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year
  )
  irfs[[treat]] <- irf %>%
    mutate(treatment = treat)
}

#Plot
irfs_all <- bind_rows(irfs)
ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.15, color = NA, fill = "dodgerblue"
  ) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1, color = "dodgerblue") +
  
  facet_wrap(~ treatment, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Max Wind"
  ) +
  #make x axis discrete  2x,4,6,8,10
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 10, by = 2)) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) 

ggsave("figures/irf_maxwind.png", dpi = 300)

CLEAN CONTROL


data_cleancontrol <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode, period) %>%
  summarise(
    any_treated = any(maxwind_treat == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  filter(
    # keep if never treated anywhere
    all(!any_treated) |
    # OR treated in both periods
    all(any_treated)
  ) %>%
  pull(countrycode) %>%
  {\(keep) data_tc %>% filter(countrycode %in% keep)}()

data_cc_80 <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode, period) %>%
  summarise(
    any_treated = any(maxwind_treat_filter == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  filter(
    # keep if never treated anywhere
    all(!any_treated) |
    # OR treated in both periods
    all(any_treated)
  ) %>%
  pull(countrycode) %>%
  {\(keep) data_tc %>% filter(countrycode %in% keep)}()

data_plot <- data_cleancontrol %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  filter(any(maxwind_treat > 0, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%  # only ever treated
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(maxwind_treat > 0) %>%                     # only event years
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  mutate(
    first_event = min(year),
    n_events    = n()
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(desc(n_events), first_event) %>%
  mutate(countrycode = factor(countrycode,
                              levels = rev(unique(countrycode))))

# -----------------------------
# 2. RHS labels
# -----------------------------
label_df <- data_plot %>%
  distinct(countrycode, n_events)

max_year <- max(data_plot$year, na.rm = TRUE)
label_x  <- max_year + 2

# -----------------------------
# 3. Split countries into top/bottom halves
# -----------------------------
country_levels <- levels(data_plot$countrycode)
n_countries    <- length(country_levels)
half_point     <- ceiling(n_countries / 2)

top_half       <- country_levels[1:half_point]
bottom_half    <- country_levels[(half_point + 1):n_countries]

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  mutate(panel = ifelse(countrycode %in% top_half, "Top", "Bottom"))

label_df <- label_df %>%
  mutate(panel = ifelse(countrycode %in% top_half, "Top", "Bottom"))

# -----------------------------
# 4. Plot
# -----------------------------
ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = year, y = countrycode)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +

  # Event count column
  geom_text(
    data = label_df,
    aes(x = label_x, y = countrycode,
        label = n_events),
    hjust = 0,
    size = 3.5,
    color = "firebrick4",
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +

  # Facet top/bottom halves
  facet_wrap(~ panel, ncol = 2, scales = "free_y") +

  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.03, 0.20))) +

  labs(x = "Year", y = "Country") +

  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(5.5, 40, 5.5, 5.5)
  )


lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    controls = lp_controls,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat",
    "maxwind_treat_country",
    "maxwind_treat_varweight"
  ),
  label = c(
    "Base",
    "Country threshold",
    "Var. weighted shock"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_cleancontrol
) %>% filter(category!="2010s")

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.15, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_x") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 

ggsave("figures/irf_comparison_cleancontrol.png", dpi = 300)

Treatment definitions

# Define shocks and their labels
shocks <- list(
  maxwind_treat = "Base",
  maxwind_treat_filter = "Base (1980+)",
  maxwind_treat_varweight = "Var. weighted shock",
  maxwind_treat_varweight_filter = "Var weighted shock (1980+)",
  maxwind_treat_country = "Country Threshold",
  maxwind_treat_country_filter = "Country Threshold (1980+)"
)
  

# Run lp_panel for each shock
irfs_all <- imap_dfr(shocks, ~ {
  lp_panel(
    data = data_tc,
    outcome = "loggdp",
    controls = "l(gdp_diff,1:2)",
    main_var = .y,
    horizon = 10,
    fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
    panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = .x)
})

# Plot
ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.2, fill = myblue) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1, color = myblue) +
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

DECADE



lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "decade"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    controls = lp_controls,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat",
    "maxwind_treat_country",
    "maxwind_treat_varweight",
     "maxwind_treat_filter",
     "maxwind_treat_country_filter",
     "maxwind_treat_varweight_filter"
    
    
  ),
  label = c(
    "Base",
    "Country threshold",
    "Var. weighted shock",
    "Base (1980+)",
    "Country threshold (1980+)",
    "Var. weighted shock (1980+)"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
) %>% filter(category!="2010s")

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.15, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_x") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "GDP growth",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 
ggsave("figures/irf_comparison_decade.png", dpi = 300)


lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_treat"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2]  +year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"

lp_interacts <- c("maxwind_treat_past3",
                  "maxwind_treat_past5",
                  "maxwind_treat_past10",
                  "maxwind_treat_past15")

# ----------------------------
# Run LPs for all past-year indicators
# ----------------------------
irf_list <- map(lp_interacts, function(interact_var) {
  df <- lp_panel_inter(
    data         = data_cleancontrol,
    outcome      = lp_outcome,
    main_var     = lp_shock,
    interact_var = interact_var,
    horizon      = lp_horizon,
    fe           = lp_fe,
    panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula = lp_vcov,
    controls     = lp_controls
  )
  df$past_years <- interact_var # keep track of which past indicator
  return(df)
})

irf_df <- bind_rows(irf_list)

irf_df <- irf_df %>%
  mutate(past_years = recode(past_years,
                             "maxwind_treat_past5"  = "Past 5 yrs",
                             "maxwind_treat_past10"  = "Past 10 yrs",
                             "maxwind_treat_past15"  = "Past 15 yrs",
                             "maxwind_treat_past3" = "Past 3 yrs")) %>%
  mutate(past_years = factor(past_years, levels = c("Past 3 yrs", "Past 5 yrs", "Past 10 yrs", "Past 15 yrs")))


# ----------------------------
# Faceted IRF plot
# ----------------------------
ggplot(irf_df, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon",
    y = "% GDP variation",
    color = "Extreme event in past N years",
    fill = "Extreme event in past N years"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  facet_wrap(~past_years, ncol = 4) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
ggsave("figures/irf_by_past_events.png", dpi = 300)
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    controls = lp_controls,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat",
    "maxwind_treat_country",
    "maxwind_treat_varweight"
  ),
  label = c(
    "Base",
    "Country threshold",
    "Var. weighted shock"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_cleancontrol
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.15, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_x") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

MAIN IRF

shocks <- c("maxwind_95", "energy_95")

# Compute IRFs
irfs_all <- map_dfr(shocks, ~ 
  lp_panel(
    data = data_tc,
    outcome = "loggdp",
    main_var = .x,
    horizon = 10,
    controls="l(gdp_diff,1:2)",
    fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2]  + year",
    panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = .x)
)

#get main irf 
irf_main <- irfs_all %>%
  filter(shock =="maxwind_95")

# Plot
ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = shock, fill = shock, linetype = shock)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("maxwind_95" = myblue, "energy_95" = myred),
                     labels = c("Energy", "Max Wind Speed")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("maxwind_95" = myblue, "energy_95" = myred),
                    labels = c("Energy", "Max Wind Speed")) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("maxwind_95" = "solid", "energy_95" = "dotdash"),
                        labels = c("Energy", "Max Wind Speed")) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "GDP growth",
    color = "", fill = "", linetype = ""
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

ggsave("figures/irf_maxwind_energy.png", dpi = 300)
# ----------------------------
# LP settings
# ----------------------------
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_95"
lp_horizon  <- 12
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"

# ----------------------------
# Run LP
# ----------------------------
irf_df <- lp_panel_inter(
  data         = data_tc,
  outcome      = lp_outcome,
  main_var     = lp_shock,
  interact_var = lp_interact,
  horizon      = lp_horizon,
  fe           = lp_fe,
  panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
  vcov_formula = lp_vcov,
  controls     = lp_controls
)

# ----------------------------
# Top plot: IRFs
# ----------------------------
p_irf <- ggplot(irf_df, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up, color = category, fill = category), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  #plot irf_main
  geom_line(data = irf_main, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, ), size = 0.9, color='black') +
  geom_line(size = 1.1, aes(color = category, fill = category)) +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "% GDP variation",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

# ----------------------------
# Bottom plot: maxwind_95 density by period
# ----------------------------
data_tc_hist <- data_tc %>%
  filter(maxwind > 0) %>%
  mutate(period = ifelse(year < 1990, "Before 1990", "After 1990")) %>% 
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    maxwind_treat = sum(maxwind_95, na.rm = TRUE),
    period = first(period)
  )

p_hist <- ggplot(
  data_tc_hist,
  aes(x = maxwind_treat, y = period, color = period)
) +
  geom_jitter(
    height = 0.18,
    alpha = 0.9,
    size = 1
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    fun = mean,
    geom = "point",
    size = 2.5,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "# of extreme events per year",
    y = ""
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  #add integer breaks to x axis
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5))


# ----------------------------
# Combine top and bottom
# ----------------------------
p_irf / p_hist + plot_layout(heights = c(3, 1))

ggsave("figures/irf_maxwind_periods.png", dpi = 300)

shocks <- c("maxwind_treat", "energy_treat")

# Compute IRFs
irfs_all <- map_dfr(shocks, ~ 
  lp_panel(
    data = data_tc,
    outcome = "loggdp",
    main_var = .x,
    horizon = 10,
    controls="l(gdp_diff,1:2)",
    fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + countrycode[year3] + countrycode[year4] year",
    panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = .x)
)

#get main irf 
irf_main <- irfs_all %>%
  filter(shock =="maxwind_treat")

# Plot
ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = shock, fill = shock, linetype = shock)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("maxwind_treat" = myblue, "energy_treat" = myred),
                     labels = c("Energy", "Max Wind Speed")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("maxwind_treat" = myblue, "energy_treat" = myred),
                    labels = c("Energy", "Max Wind Speed")) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("maxwind_treat" = "solid", "energy_treat" = "dotdash"),
                        labels = c("Energy", "Max Wind Speed")) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "GDP growth",
    color = "", fill = "", linetype = ""
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

ggsave("figures/irf_maxwindtreat_energy.png", dpi = 300)
# ----------------------------
# LP settings
# ----------------------------
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_treat"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"

# ----------------------------
# Run LP
# ----------------------------
irf_df <- lp_panel_inter(
  data         = data_tc,
  outcome      = lp_outcome,
  main_var     = lp_shock,
  interact_var = lp_interact,
  horizon      = lp_horizon,
  fe           = lp_fe,
  panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
  controls     = lp_controls,
  vcov_formula = lp_vcov
)

# ----------------------------
# Top plot: IRFs
# ----------------------------
p_irf <- ggplot(irf_df, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up, color = category, fill = category), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  #plot irf_main
  geom_line(data = irf_main, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, ), size = 0.9, color='black') +
  geom_line(size = 1.1, aes(color = category, fill = category)) +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "% GDP variation",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

# ----------------------------
# Bottom plot: maxwind_95 density by period
# ----------------------------
data_tc_hist <- data_tc %>%
  filter(maxwind > 0) %>%
  mutate(period = ifelse(year < 1990, "Before 1990", "After 1990")) %>% 
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    maxwind_treat = sum(maxwind_95, na.rm = TRUE),
    period = first(period)
  )

p_hist <- ggplot(
  data_tc_hist,
  aes(x = maxwind_treat, y = period, color = period)
) +
  geom_jitter(
    height = 0.18,
    alpha = 0.9,
    size = 1
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    fun = median,
    geom = "point",
    size = 2.5,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "# of extreme events per year",
    y = ""
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  #add integer breaks to x axis
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5))


# ----------------------------
# Combine top and bottom
# ----------------------------
p_irf / p_hist + plot_layout(heights = c(3, 1))

ggsave("figures/irf_maxwindtreat_periods.png", dpi = 300)

Interact with Past treatment Dummy


lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_treat"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2]  +year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"

lp_interacts <- c("maxwind_treat_past3",
                  "maxwind_treat_past5",
                  "maxwind_treat_past10",
                  "maxwind_treat_past15")

# ----------------------------
# Run LPs for all past-year indicators
# ----------------------------
irf_list <- map(lp_interacts, function(interact_var) {
  df <- lp_panel_inter(
    data         = data_tc,
    outcome      = lp_outcome,
    main_var     = lp_shock,
    interact_var = interact_var,
    horizon      = lp_horizon,
    fe           = lp_fe,
    panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula = lp_vcov,
    controls     = lp_controls
  )
  df$past_years <- interact_var # keep track of which past indicator
  return(df)
})

irf_df <- bind_rows(irf_list)

irf_df <- irf_df %>%
  mutate(past_years = recode(past_years,
                             "maxwind_treat_past5"  = "Past 5 yrs",
                             "maxwind_treat_past10"  = "Past 10 yrs",
                             "maxwind_treat_past15"  = "Past 15 yrs",
                             "maxwind_treat_past3" = "Past 3 yrs")) %>%
  mutate(past_years = factor(past_years, levels = c("Past 3 yrs", "Past 5 yrs", "Past 10 yrs", "Past 15 yrs")))


# ----------------------------
# Faceted IRF plot
# ----------------------------
ggplot(irf_df, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon",
    y = "% GDP variation",
    color = "Extreme event in past N years",
    fill = "Extreme event in past N years"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  facet_wrap(~past_years, ncol = 4) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

ggsave("figures/irf_maxwindtreat_pastyears.png", dpi = 300)
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_treat_varweight"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,2:3)"

lp_interacts <- c("ttl_bin2")

# ----------------------------
# Run LPs for all past-year indicators
# ----------------------------
irf_list <- map(lp_interacts, function(interact_var) {
  df <- lp_panel_inter(
    data         = data_tc,
    outcome      = lp_outcome,
    main_var     = lp_shock,
    interact_var = interact_var,
    horizon      = lp_horizon,
    fe           = lp_fe,
    panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula = lp_vcov,
    controls     = lp_controls
  )
  df$past_years <- interact_var # keep track of which past indicator
  return(df)
})

irf_df <- bind_rows(irf_list)

irf_df <- irf_df %>%
  mutate(
    category = factor(
      category,
      levels = c(
        "No past shock",
        "1-5",
        "5-10",
        "10-15",
        "15-20",
        "20+"
      )
    )
  )

greta_colors <- c(
  "No past shock" = "#333333",  # dark red (recent / baseline)
  "1-5"          = "#F46D43",
  "5-10"         = "#FDAE61",
  "10-15"        = "#FEE08B",
  "15-20"        = "#A6D96A",
  "20+"          = "#2C7BB6"   # deep blue (old shocks)
)


# ----------------------------
# Faceted IRF plot
# ----------------------------
ggplot(irf_df, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon",
    y = "% GDP growth",
    color = "Time since last event",
    fill = "Time since last event"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
   scale_color_manual(values = greta_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = greta_colors) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_treat"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_controls <- NULL# "l(gdp_diff,2:5)"

lp_interacts <- c("ttl_bin3")

# ----------------------------
# Run LPs for all past-year indicators
# ----------------------------
irf_list <- map(lp_interacts, function(interact_var) {
  df <- lp_panel_inter(
    data         = data_tc,
    outcome      = lp_outcome,
    main_var     = lp_shock,
    interact_var = interact_var,
    horizon      = lp_horizon,
    fe           = lp_fe,
    panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula = lp_vcov,
    controls     = lp_controls
  )
  df$past_years <- interact_var # keep track of which past indicator
  return(df)
})

irf_df <- bind_rows(irf_list)

irf_df <- irf_df %>%
  mutate(
    category = factor(
      category,
      levels = c(
        "No past shock",
        "1-5",
        "5-10",
        "10+"
      )
    )
  )
greta_colors <- setNames(
  brewer.pal(4, "Spectral")[c(4,3,2,1)],
  c("No past shock", "1-5", "5-10", "10+")
)


# ----------------------------
# Faceted IRF plot
# ----------------------------
ggplot(irf_df, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  # geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.1, color = NA) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon",
    y = "% GDP growth",
    color = "Years since last event",
    fill = "Years since last event"
  ) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 2), fill = guide_legend(nrow = 2)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
   scale_color_manual(values = greta_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = greta_colors) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

ggsave("figures/irf_maxwindtreat_ttlbin3.png", dpi = 300)
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_treat"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_controls <- NULL #"l(loggdp,2:10)"

lp_interacts <- c("ttl_bin")

# ----------------------------
# Run LPs for all past-year indicators
# ----------------------------
irf_list <- map(lp_interacts, function(interact_var) {
  df <- lp_panel_inter(
    data         = data_tc,
    outcome      = lp_outcome,
    main_var     = lp_shock,
    interact_var = interact_var,
    horizon      = lp_horizon,
    fe           = lp_fe,
    panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula = lp_vcov,
    controls     = lp_controls
  )
  df$past_years <- interact_var # keep track of which past indicator
  return(df)
})

irf_df <- bind_rows(irf_list)

irf_df <- irf_df %>%
  mutate(
    category = factor(
      category,
      levels = c(
        "No past shock",
        "1-3",
        "3-5",
        "5-7",
        "7-10",
        "10-15",
        "15-20",
        "20+"
      )
    )
  )

greta_colors <- c(
  "No past shock" = "#333333",  # dark red
  "1-3"          = "#D73027",
  "3-5"          = "#F46D43",
  "5-7"          = "#FDAE61",
  "7-10"         = "#FEE08B",
  "10-15"        = "#A6D96A",
  "15-20"        = "#4DAF4A",
  "20+"          = "#2C7BB6"   # deep blue
)


# ----------------------------
# Faceted IRF plot
# ----------------------------
ggplot(irf_df, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon",
    y = "% GDP variation",
    color = "Time since last event",
    fill = "Time since last event"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
   scale_color_manual(values = greta_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = greta_colors) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_treat"
lp_horizon  <- 15
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_controls <- NULL #"l(loggdp,2:10)"

lp_interacts <- c("ttl_bin3")

# ----------------------------
# Run LPs for all past-year indicators
# ----------------------------
irf_list <- map(lp_interacts, function(interact_var) {
  df <- lp_panel_inter(
    data         = data_tc,
    outcome      = lp_outcome,
    main_var     = lp_shock,
    interact_var = interact_var,
    horizon      = lp_horizon,
    fe           = lp_fe,
    panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula = lp_vcov,
    controls     = lp_controls
  )
  df$past_years <- interact_var # keep track of which past indicator
  return(df)
})

irf_df <- bind_rows(irf_list)

irf_recovery <- irf_df %>%
  group_by(category) %>%
  arrange(horizon) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(
    first_below_zero = ifelse(any(irf_mean < 0), min(horizon[irf_mean < 0]), NA_real_),
    first_back_to_zero = ifelse(
      any(irf_mean < 0) & any(irf_mean >= 0 & horizon > min(horizon[irf_mean < 0])),
      min(horizon[irf_mean >= 0 & horizon > min(horizon[irf_mean < 0])]),
      NA_real_
    ),
    recovery_time = case_when(
      is.na(first_below_zero) ~ 0,      # never goes below 0
      is.na(first_back_to_zero) ~lp_horizon , # never recovers within horizon
      TRUE ~ first_back_to_zero - first_below_zero
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
irf_recovery <- irf_recovery %>%
  mutate(
    category = factor(
      category,
      levels = c(
        "1-5",
        "5-10",
        "10+",
        "No past shock"
      )
    )
  )


ggplot(irf_recovery, aes(x = category, y = recovery_time)) +
  geom_point(
    size = 3,
    shape = 4,              # "x" marker
    color = "steelblue",
    stroke = 1.2
  ) +
  geom_line(
    group = 1,
    color = "steelblue",
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 15)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Time since last event",
    y = "Estimated recovery time (years)"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15)
ggsave("figures/recovery_time_ttlbin3.png", dpi = 300)

Individual IRFS

irfs_list <- list()

country_tc <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  filter(any(maxwind_treat > 0, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  pull(countrycode) %>%
  unique()

for (i in country_tc) {
  


irfs_country <- bind_rows(irfs_list)

country_covars <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_maxwind      = mean(maxwind, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_treated         = sum(maxwind_treat == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_loggdp_pc     = mean(ln_real_gdp_usd_pc, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

irfs_covars <- irfs_country %>%
  left_join(country_covars, by = "countrycode")

irfs_covars_min <- irfs_covars %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  summarise(
    min_irf = min(irf, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_irf = max(irf, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_maxwind = mean(mean_maxwind, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_treated = mean(n_treated, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_loggdp_pc = mean(avg_loggdp_pc, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

#get recovery time from irf going back to 0 after going negative
recovery_time <- irfs_covars %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  arrange(horizon) %>%
  summarise(
    first_below_zero = ifelse(any(irf < 0), min(horizon[irf < 0]), NA_real_),
    first_back_to_zero = ifelse(
      any(irf < 0) & any(irf >= 0 & horizon > min(horizon[irf < 0])),
      min(horizon[irf >= 0 & horizon > min(horizon[irf < 0])]),
      NA_real_
    ),
    recovery_time = case_when(
      is.na(first_below_zero) ~ 0,      # never goes below 0
      is.na(first_back_to_zero) ~ lp_horizon, # never recovers within horizon
      TRUE ~ first_back_to_zero - first_below_zero
    ),
    .groups = "drop",
    mean_maxwind = mean(mean_maxwind, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_treated = mean(n_treated, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_loggdp_pc = mean(avg_loggdp_pc, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

mod <- lm(min_irf ~ mean_maxwind + n_treated + avg_loggdp_pc, data = irfs_covars_min, vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(type = "HC1"))
print(summary(mod))

mod <- lm(max_irf ~ mean_maxwind + n_treated + avg_loggdp_pc, data = irfs_covars_min, vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(type = "HC1"))
print(summary(mod))

# recovery tine

mod <- lm(recovery_time ~ mean_maxwind*n_treated*avg_loggdp_pc, data = recovery_time, vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(type = "HC1"))
print(summary(mod))

irfs_long <- irfs_covars %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(mean_maxwind, n_treated, avg_loggdp_pc),
    names_to = "covariate",
    values_to = "value"
  )

ggplot(irfs_long,
       aes(x = value, y = irf)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = T) +
  facet_grid(horizon~covariate , scales = "free_x") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "IRF"
  ) +
  #print pearson correlation in each facet
  stat_cor(method = "pearson", label.x.npc = "left", label.y.npc = "top", size = 4) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) 

mod <- lm(irf ~ as.factor(horizon):mean_maxwind + as.factor(horizon):n_treated + as.factor(horizon):avg_loggdp_pc, data = irfs_covars, vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(type = "HC1"))
summary(mod) %>% print()

Misc


lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"


shock_map <- tibble::tribble(
  ~var, ~label, ~dataset,
  "maxwind_treat",        "Wind treatment",           data_cleancontrol,
  "maxwind_sqkm_treat",   "Wind per sqkm treatment",  data_cc_sqkm,
  "maxwind_shock",        "Wind shock",               data_cleancontrol,
  "maxwind_sqkm_shock",   "Wind per sqkm shock",      data_cc_sqkm,
  "maxwind",              "Wind speed",               data_cleancontrol,
  "maxwind_sqkm",         "Wind speed per sqkm",      data_cc_sqkm
)


run_lp <- function(var, label, dataset) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = dataset,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    controls      = lp_controls,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = label)
}

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(shock_map, run_lp)


ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  # x-axis integer by 2
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, lp_horizon, by = 2)) +
  
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )
ggsave("figures/irf_all_shocks.png", dpi = 300)

# Define shocks and their labels
shocks <- list(
  maxwind_treat = "Maximum Wind Speed",
  nlands_treat = "Number of Landfalls",
  energy_treat = "Storm Energy")

# Run lp_panel for each shock
irfs_all <- imap_dfr(shocks, ~ {
  lp_panel(
    data = data_tc,
    outcome = "loggdp",
    controls = "l(gdp_diff,1:2)",
    main_var = .y,
    horizon = 10,
    fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
    panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = .x)
})

# Plot
ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.2, fill = myblue) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1, color = myblue) +
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )


lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period3"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    controls = lp_controls,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_95",
    "nlands_95",
    "energy_95"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed",
    "1/20y Landfalls",
    "1/20y Energy"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 


lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "decade"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    controls = lp_controls,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat",
    "maxwind_sqkm_shock",
    "maxwind_sqkm_treat",
    "maxwind_shock",
    "nlands_sqkm_treat",
    "nlands_sqkm_shock",
    "nlands_treat",
    "nlands_shock"
  ),
  label = c(
    "Wind treatment",
    "Wind per sqkm shock",
    "Wind per sqkm treatment",
    "Wind shock",
    "Landfalls per sqkm treat",
    "Landfalls per sqkm shock",
    "Landfalls treatment",
    "Landfalls shock"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
) %>% filter(category!="2010s")

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 4, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

Raw vs residualized

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    controls = lp_controls,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_95",
    "maxwind_treat",
    "wind_cat1",
    "wind_cat3"
    
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed (raw)",
    "1/20y Wind speed (residualized)",
    "Tropical Cyclone (Cat1+)",
    "Tropical Cyclone (Cat3+)"
    
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 2, scales = "free_x") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 
shocks <- c(
  "maxwind_95",
  "maxwind_treat",
  "maxwind_sqkm_95",
  "maxwind_sqkm_treat"
)

irfs_all <- shocks %>%
  map_dfr(~ 
    lp_panel(
      data = data_tc,
      outcome = "loggdp",
      main_var = .x,
      horizon = 12,
      fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
      panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
      vcov_formula = DK ~ year
    ) %>%
      mutate(term = .x)
  )

df_plot <- irfs_all %>%
  mutate(
    panel = ifelse(grepl("sqkm", term), "Max wind per sqkm", "Max wind"),
    type  = ifelse(grepl("treat", term), "Residualized", "Raw")
  )

ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up, fill = type),
    alpha = 0.15
  ) +
  geom_line(
    aes(color = type, linetype = type),
    linewidth = 1.1
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ panel, ncol = 2, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Raw" = myblue, "Residualized" = myred)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Raw" = myblue, "Residualized" = myred)) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Raw" = "solid", "Residualized" = "dotdash")) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "", fill = "", linetype = ""
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top"
  )


lp_outcome  <- "tfp"
lp_horizon  <- 12
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}

  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat",
    "nlands_treat",

    "1/20y Energy"
  )
)

  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +

    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),

    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 15
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "continent"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_95",
    "nlands_95",
    "energy_95"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed",
    "1/20y Landfalls",
    "1/20y Energy"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  #geom_ribbon(
  #  aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
  #  alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  #) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 15
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "continent"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    controls     = lp_controls,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  # Zero line (softer)
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6, color = "grey40") +
  
  # Confidence band (optional, looks nice if you turn it back on)
  # geom_ribbon(
  #   aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
  #   alpha = 0.15,
  #   color = NA
  # ) +
  
  # Main IRF lines
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "GDP growth",
    color = "Continent",
    fill  = "Continent"
  ) +
  
  # Percent axis with cleaner formatting
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)
  ) +
  
  # Wrap legend into multiple rows
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE),
    fill  = guide_legend(nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE)
  ) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 
ggsave("figures/irf_maxwindtreat_continent.png", dpi = 300)

lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov,
    #controls      = lp_controls
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}

  var   = c(

    "maxwind_treat"

    "1/20y Wind speed (residualized)"

)

  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
) %>% filter( category %in% c("USA","JPN","DOM","PHL"))

    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",

    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),

lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "countrycode"
lp_controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov,
    controls      = lp_controls
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
) %>% filter( category %in% c("USA","JPN","DOM","PHL"))

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  # geom_ribbon(
  #   aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
  #   alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  # ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "GDP growth",
    color = "Country",
    fill = "Country"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 

ggsave("figures/irf_maxwindtreat_country.png", dpi = 300)

TFP

outcomes <- c("loggdp", "tfp")

irfs_all <- outcomes %>%
  map_dfr(~ 
    lp_panel(
      data = data_tc,
      outcome = .x,
      main_var = "maxwind_treat",
      #controls =paste0( "l(", .x, ",2)"),
      horizon = 12,
      fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
      panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
      vcov_formula = DK ~ year
    ) %>%
      mutate(outcome = .x)
  )
ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6) +

  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up, fill = outcome),
    alpha = 0.15
  ) +
  geom_line(
    aes(color = outcome, linetype = outcome),
    linewidth = 1.1
  ) +

  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("loggdp" = myblue, "tfp" = myred),
    labels = c("GDP per capita", "TFP")
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("loggdp" = myblue, "tfp" = myred),
    labels = c("GDP per capita", "TFP")
  ) +
  scale_linetype_manual(
    values = c("loggdp" = "solid", "tfp" = "dotdash"),
    labels = c("GDP per capita", "TFP")
  ) +

  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF",
    color = "", fill = "", linetype = ""
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +

  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

lp_horizon  <- 12
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"
shock_var   <- "maxwind_treat"

run_lp <- function(outcome_name) {
  lp_panel_inter(
    data         = data_tc,
    outcome      = outcome_name,
    main_var     = shock_var,
    interact_var = lp_interact,
    horizon      = lp_horizon,
    fe           = lp_fe,
    panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula = lp_vcov,
    #controls    =paste0("l(", outcome_name, ",2)")
  ) %>%
    mutate(outcome = outcome_name)
}


irfs_all <- c("loggdp", "tfp") %>% map_dfr(run_lp)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ outcome, ncol = 2, scales = "free_x") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background  = element_blank(),
    strip.text        = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position   = "top"
  )

Is it shaped by rich/poor

world <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf")
map_data <- left_join(world, data_tc, by = c("iso_a3" = "countrycode"))
ggplot(world) +
  geom_sf(
    data = map_data,
    aes(fill = credit_bin),
    color = "white",
    linewidth = 0.1
  ) +
  scale_fill_brewer(
    palette = "Blues",
    na.value = "grey",
    name = "Domestic credit"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )


ggplot(world) +
  geom_sf(
    data = map_data,
    aes(fill = gdp_pc_bin),
    color = "white",
    linewidth = 0.1
  ) +
  scale_fill_brewer(
    palette = "Reds",
    na.value = "grey",
    name = "GDP PC",
    direction = -1
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

ggplot(world) +
  geom_sf(
    data = map_data,
    aes(fill = gdp_pc_group),
    color = "white",
    linewidth = 0.1
  ) +
  scale_fill_brewer(
    palette = "Reds",
    na.value = "grey",
    name = "GDP PC",
    direction = -1
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 12
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[time] + countrycode[time2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "gdp_pc_bin"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind",
    "maxwind_sqkm",
    "nlands",
    "nlands_sqkm",
    "energy",
    "energy_sqkm"
  ),
  label = c(
    "Wind exposure",
    "Wind exposure / sq km",
    "# Landfalls",
    "# Landfalls / sq km",
    "Energy exposure",
    "Energy exposure / sq km"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc %>% filter(year>=1990)
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category_value, fill = category_value)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "year + countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2]"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "gdp_pc_bin"
controls <- "l(gdp_diff,1:2)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    controls     = controls,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc 
) 

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "GDP growth",
    color = "GDP group",
    fill = "GDP group"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) 

ggsave("figures/irf_gdp_pc_groups_wind.png", dpi = 300)

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "year + countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2]"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "gdp_pc_bin"
controls <- NULL


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    controls     = controls,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat",
    "nlands_treat",
    "energy_treat"
  ),
  label = c(
    "1/20y Wind speed",
    "1/20y Landfalls",
    "1/20y Energy"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc 
) %>% filter(shock =="1/20y Wind speed")

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_x") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "GDP group",
    fill = "GDP group"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"

lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "credit_bin"
controls <- NULL


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    controls     = controls,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}

lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "gdp_pc_group"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}

  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat",
    "nlands_treat",
    "energy_treat"
  ),

    "1/20y Wind speed",
    "1/20y Landfalls",
    "1/20y Energy"
  )
)

  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),

  data = data_tc 
)

    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),

  ) +
