ROBUSTNESS

controls <-c("0", "l(gdp_diff,1:2)", "l(gdp_diff,1:4)")

irfs_all <- controls %>%
  map_dfr(~ 
    lp_panel(
      data = data_tc,
      outcome = "loggdp",
      main_var = "maxwind_treat",
      controls = .x,
      horizon = 12,
      fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
      panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
      vcov_formula = DK ~ year
    ) %>%
      mutate(control = .x)
  )
ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6) +

  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up, fill = control),
    alpha = 0.15
  ) +
  geom_line(
    aes(color = control, linetype = control),
    linewidth = 1.1
  ) +


  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF",
    color = "", fill = "", linetype = ""
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +

  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
irf_ols <- lp_panel_inter(
  data = data_tc,
  outcome = "loggdp",
  main_var = "maxwind_treat",
  fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
  panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year,
  interact_var = "period"
)

irf_iv <- lp_panel_inter(
  data = data_tc,
  outcome = "loggdp",
  main_var = "maxwind_treat",
  interact_var = "period",
  controls = "l(gdp_diff,1:2)",
  fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
  panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
  vcov_formula = DK ~ year

)

irfs_all <- bind_rows(
  irf_ols %>% mutate(type = "Main"),
  irf_iv  %>% mutate(type = "Lag-augmented")
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category, linetype = category)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  facet_wrap(~ type) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "GDP growth",
    color = "Period", fill = "Period", linetype = "Period"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

shocks <- c("maxwind_treat", "maxwind_treat_year")

# Compute IRFs
irfs_all <- map_dfr(shocks, ~ 
  lp_panel(
    data = data_tc,
    outcome = "loggdp",
    main_var = .x,
    horizon = 12,
    #controls="l(loggdp,2)",
    fe = "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
    panel_id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov_formula = DK ~ year
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = .x)
)


# Plot
ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = shock, fill = shock, linetype = shock)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "GDP growth",
    color = "", fill = "", linetype = ""
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

ggsave("figures/robust_treatment.png", dpi = 300)

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = "maxwind_treat",
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov,
    controls      = main_var
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "0",
    "l(gdp_diff,2)",
    "l(gdp_diff,2:5)",
    "l(gdp_diff,2:10)"
  ),
  label = c(
    "None",
    "1 lag of dGDP ",
    "4 lags of dGDP",
    "9 lags of dGDP"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 2, scales = "free_x") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  ylim(-0.07,0.07) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )
interact_map <- tibble::tibble(
  interact_var = c("period90", "period91", "period92", "period89", "period88"),
  interact_lbl = c("1990", "1991", "1992", "1989", "1988")
)
run_lp <- function(data, interact_var, interact_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = "maxwind_treat",
    interact_var  = interact_var,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov,
    controls      = NULL
  ) %>%
    mutate(interaction = interact_label)
}
irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(interact_map$interact_var, interact_map$interact_lbl),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)
ggplot(irfs_all,
       aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean,
           color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ interaction, ncol = 5) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill  = "Period"
  ) +
  
  ylim(-0.07, 0.07) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"
lp_controls <- "l(loggdp,2)"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov,
    #controls      = lp_controls
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "maxwind_treat",
    "maxwind_sqkm_treat",
    "nlands_treat",
    "nlands_sqkm_treat",
    "energy_treat",
    "energy_sqkm_treat"
  ),
  label = c(
    "Wind speed",
    "Wind speed / sq km",
    "# Landfalls",
    "# Landfalls / sq km",
    "Energy exposure",
    "Energy exposure / sq km"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_tc
)

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_x") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  ylim(-0.07,0.07) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

ggsave("figures/robust_measure.png", dpi = 300)


lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_treat"
lp_horizon  <- 12
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"
lp_controls <- NULL

# ----------------------------
# Full-sample IRF
# ----------------------------
irf_full <- lp_panel_inter(
  data = data_tc,
  outcome = lp_outcome,
  main_var = lp_shock,
  interact_var = lp_interact,
  horizon = lp_horizon,
  controls = lp_controls,
  fe = lp_fe,
  panel_id = lp_panel_id,
  vcov_formula = lp_vcov
) %>%
  mutate(
    loo_type = "Full sample",
    left_out = NA_character_
  )

# ----------------------------
# Leave-one-country-out IRFs
# ----------------------------
loo_country <- data_tc %>%
  split(.$countrycode) %>%
  imap_dfr(~ {
    df <- data_tc %>% filter(countrycode != .y)
    lp_panel_inter(
      data = df,
      outcome = lp_outcome,
      main_var = lp_shock,
      interact_var = lp_interact,
      controls = lp_controls,
      horizon = lp_horizon,
      fe = lp_fe,
      panel_id = lp_panel_id,
      vcov_formula = lp_vcov
    ) %>%
      mutate(loo_type = "Leave-one-country", left_out = .y)
  })

# ----------------------------
# Leave-one-year-out IRFs
# ----------------------------
loo_year <- data_tc %>%
  split(.$year) %>%
  imap_dfr(~ {
    df <- data_tc %>% filter(year != .y)
    lp_panel_inter(
      data = df,
      outcome = lp_outcome,
      main_var = lp_shock,
      interact_var = lp_interact,
      controls = lp_controls,
      horizon = lp_horizon,
      fe = lp_fe,
      panel_id = lp_panel_id,
      vcov_formula = lp_vcov
    ) %>%
      mutate(loo_type = "Leave-one-year", left_out = .y)
  })

# ----------------------------
# Combine all for plotting
# ----------------------------
irf_plot_df <- bind_rows(irf_full, loo_country, loo_year) %>%
  mutate(loo_type = factor(loo_type, levels = c("Leave-one-country", "Leave-one-year", "Full sample")))

# ----------------------------
# Separate dataframes
# ----------------------------

# Full-sample IRFs
full_sample <- irf_plot_df %>% filter(loo_type == "Full sample")

# LOO by country
loo_country <- irf_plot_df %>% 
  filter(loo_type == "Leave-one-country") %>%
  # Add full-sample IRF for overlay
  bind_rows(full_sample %>% mutate(loo_type = "Leave-one-country")) %>%
  arrange(left_out)

# LOO by year
loo_year <- irf_plot_df %>% 
  filter(loo_type == "Leave-one-year") %>%
  # Add full-sample IRF for overlay
  bind_rows(full_sample %>% mutate(loo_type = "Leave-one-year")) %>%
  arrange(left_out)

# ----------------------------
# Plot function
# ----------------------------
plot_loo <- function(df, title) {
  ggplot(df) +
    # Full-sample IRFs (colored ribbons + lines)
    geom_ribbon(
      data = df %>% filter(left_out %>% is.na()), # full sample
      aes(x = horizon, ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up, fill = category),
      alpha = 0.2, color = NA
    ) +
    
      # LOO IRFs (thin black lines)
    geom_line(
      data = df %>% filter(!is.na(left_out)),
      aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, group = interaction(left_out, category)),
      color = "black",
      size = 0.2,
      alpha = 0.6
    ) +
    geom_line(
      data = df %>% filter(left_out %>% is.na()), # full sample
      aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category),
      size = 1.3
    ) +

    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
    labs(
      x = "Horizon (years)",
      y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
      title = title,
      color = "Period",
      fill  = "Period"
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
      legend.position = "top"
    )
}

# ----------------------------
# Generate plots
# ----------------------------
p_loo_country <- plot_loo(loo_country, "")
p_loo_year    <- plot_loo(loo_year, "")

# Display
p_loo_country
ggsave("figures/robust_loo_country.png", plot = p_loo_country, dpi = 300)
p_loo_year
ggsave("figures/robust_loo_year.png", plot = p_loo_year, dpi = 300)
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period"
lp_controls <- NULL

fe_specs <- tibble(
  fe_label = c("Country + Year + Quad. Trend", " Country + Year + Lin. Trend", "Country + Year + ContinentxYear + Quad. Trend"),
  fe_var   = c("countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year",
               "countrycode[year] + year",
               "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + continent^year")
)

shock_map <- tibble(
  main_var   = "maxwind_treat",
  shock_label = "1/20y Wind speed"
)

run_lp_fe <- function(fe_var, fe_label) {
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data_tc,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = shock_map$main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = fe_var,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    controls      = lp_controls,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(fe_label = fe_label)
}


irfs_all <- fe_specs %>%
  pmap_dfr(~ run_lp_fe(..2, ..1))  # ..1 = fe_label, ..2 = fe_var

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  facet_wrap(~ fe_label, ncol = 3, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

ggsave("figures/robust_fe.png", dpi = 300)
# ----------------------------
# LP settings
# ----------------------------
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_treat"
lp_horizon  <- 10
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_interact <- "period"
lp_controls <- NULL #"l(loggdp,2)"

# ----------------------------
# Run main IRF (DK SE)
# ----------------------------
irf_dk <- lp_panel_inter(
  data          = data_tc,
  outcome       = lp_outcome,
  main_var      = lp_shock,
  interact_var  = lp_interact,
  horizon       = lp_horizon,
  fe            = lp_fe,
  panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
  controls      = lp_controls,
  vcov_formula  = DK ~ year
) %>%
  mutate(se_type = "DK")

# ----------------------------
# Run IRF with clustered SEs (no fill)
# ----------------------------
irf_cluster <- lp_panel_inter(
  data          = data_tc,
  outcome       = lp_outcome,
  main_var      = lp_shock,
  interact_var  = lp_interact,
  horizon       = lp_horizon,
  fe            = lp_fe,
  panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
  controls      = lp_controls,
  vcov_formula  = cluster ~ countrycode +year
) %>%
  mutate(se_type = "Clustered")

# ----------------------------
# Combine for plotting
# ----------------------------
irf_plot <- bind_rows(
  irf_dk,
  irf_cluster
)

# ----------------------------
# Plot
# ----------------------------
ggplot() +
  # DK ribbon (filled)
  geom_ribbon(
    data = irf_plot %>% filter(se_type == "DK"),
    aes(x = horizon, ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up, fill = category),
    alpha = 0.15
  ) +
  # Clustered CI (no fill, black line)
  geom_ribbon(
    data = irf_plot %>% filter(se_type == "Clustered"),
    aes(x = horizon, ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up, color = category),
    fill = NA, linetype = "dashed", size = 1
  ) +
  # Mean line (from DK)
  geom_line(
    data = irf_dk,
    aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category),
    size = 1.1
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = " GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

ggsave("figures/robust_se.png", dpi = 300)
# ----------------------------
# LP settings
# ----------------------------
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_treat"
lp_horizon  <- 8
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "period3"
lp_controls <- NULL #"l(loggdp,2)"

# ----------------------------
# Run LP
# ----------------------------
irf_df <- lp_panel_inter(
  data         = data_tc,
  outcome      = lp_outcome,
  main_var     = lp_shock,
  interact_var = lp_interact,
  horizon      = lp_horizon,
  fe           = lp_fe,
  panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
  controls     = lp_controls,
  vcov_formula = lp_vcov
)

# ----------------------------
# Top plot: IRFs
# ----------------------------
p_irf <- ggplot(irf_df, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up, color = category, fill = category), alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1, aes(color = category, fill = category)) +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "% GDP variation",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

# ----------------------------
# Bottom plot: maxwind_95 density by period
# ----------------------------
data_tc_hist <- data_tc %>%
  filter(maxwind > 0) %>%
  mutate(period = ifelse(year <= 1984, "1970-1984", ifelse(year <=1999, "1985-1999", "2000-2014"))) %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    maxwind_treat = sum(maxwind_95, na.rm = TRUE),
    period = first(period)
  )

p_hist <- ggplot(
  data_tc_hist,
  aes(x = maxwind_treat, y = period, color = period)
) +
  geom_jitter(
    height = 0.18,
    alpha = 0.9,
    size = 1
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    fun = mean,
    geom = "point",
    size = 2.5,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "# of extreme events per year",
    y = ""
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  #add integer breaks to x axis
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5))


# ----------------------------
# Combine top and bottom
# ----------------------------
p_irf / p_hist + plot_layout(heights = c(3, 1))

ggsave("figures/robust_period.png", dpi = 300)

# ----------------------------
# LP settings
# ----------------------------
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_shock    <- "maxwind_treat"
lp_horizon  <- 8
lp_fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
lp_vcov     <- DK ~ year
lp_interact <- "decade"
lp_controls <- NULL #"l(loggdp,2)"

# ----------------------------
# Run LP
# ----------------------------
irf_df <- lp_panel_inter(
  data         = data_tc,
  outcome      = lp_outcome,
  main_var     = lp_shock,
  interact_var = lp_interact,
  horizon      = lp_horizon,
  fe           = lp_fe,
  panel_id     = lp_panel_id,
  controls     = lp_controls,
  vcov_formula = lp_vcov
)

# ----------------------------
# Top plot: IRFs
# ----------------------------
p_irf <- ggplot(irf_df, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up, color = category, fill = category), alpha = 0.1, color = NA) +
  geom_line(size = 1.1, aes(color = category, fill = category)) +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "% GDP variation",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

# ----------------------------
# Bottom plot: maxwind_95 density by period
# ----------------------------
data_tc_hist <- data_tc %>%
  filter(maxwind > 0) %>%
  mutate(decade = case_when(
    year >= 1970 & year <= 1979 ~ "1970s",
    year >= 1980 & year <= 1989 ~ "1980s",
    year >= 1990 & year <= 1999 ~ "1990s",
    year >= 2000 & year <= 2009 ~ "2000s",
    year >= 2010 & year <= 2019 ~ "2010s"
  )) %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    maxwind_treat = sum(maxwind_95, na.rm = TRUE),
    period = first(decade)
  )

p_hist <- ggplot(
  data_tc_hist,
  aes(x = maxwind_treat, y = period, color = period)
) +
  geom_jitter(
    height = 0.18,
    alpha = 0.9,
    size = 1
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    fun = mean,
    geom = "point",
    size = 2.5,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "# of extreme events per year",
    y = ""
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  #add integer breaks to x axis
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5))


# ----------------------------
# Combine top and bottom
# ----------------------------
p_irf / p_hist + plot_layout(heights = c(3, 1))

ggsave("figures/robust_decade.png", dpi = 300)

MAPS


data_tc_filtered <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  filter(max(maxwind, na.rm = TRUE) > 0 | max(nlands, na.rm = TRUE) > 0) %>%
  ungroup()


ggplot(
  ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
    left_join(
      data_tc_filtered %>%
        group_by(countrycode) %>%
        summarise(mean_maxwind = mean(maxwind, na.rm = TRUE)),
      by = c("iso_a3" = "countrycode")
    )
) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = mean_maxwind), color = "white", size = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_distiller(
    palette = "YlOrRd",
    direction = 1,
    na.value = "grey90",
    name = " Max Wind Speed (m/s)"
  ) +
  coord_sf(crs = "+proj=robin") +
  theme_void() +
      theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )

ggsave("figures/map_maxwind.png", width = 8, height = 5)


ggplot(
  ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
    left_join(
      data_tc_filtered %>%
        group_by(countrycode) %>%
        summarise(n_landfalls = mean(nlands, na.rm = TRUE)),
      by = c("iso_a3" = "countrycode")
    )
) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = n_landfalls), color = "white", size = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = c("darkblue", RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9, "YlOrRd")),
    values = scales::rescale(
      c(
        0,
        min(data_tc_filtered$nlands[data_tc_filtered$nlands > 0], na.rm = TRUE),
        max(data_tc_filtered$nlands, na.rm = TRUE)
      )
    ),
    na.value = "grey90",
    name = "# Landfalls"
  ) +
  coord_sf(crs = "+proj=robin") +
  theme_void() +
      theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )

ggsave("figures/map_nlandfalls.png", width = 8, height = 5)


ggplot(
  ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
    left_join(
      data_tc %>%
        group_by(countrycode) %>%
        summarise(gdp = mean(loggdp, na.rm = TRUE)),
      by = c("iso_a3" = "countrycode")
    )
) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = gdp), color = "white", size = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = c("darkblue", RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9, "Spectral")),
    values = scales::rescale(
      c(
        min(data_tc$gdp, na.rm = TRUE),
        max(data_tc$gdp, na.rm = TRUE)
      )
    ),
       #labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 0.1), # <-- display as %
    na.value = "grey90",
    name = "log GDP pc"
  ) +
  #robinson proj
  coord_sf(crs = "+proj=robin") +
  theme_void() +
      theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )

ggsave("figures/map_gdp.png", width = 8, height = 5)

R2 per Horizon

results <- list()
for (h in 0:10) {

  m_base <- feols(
    f(loggdp, h) - l(loggdp, 1) ~ 
      maxwind_shock + l(gdp_diff, 1:2) |
      countrycode[year] + year,
    data = data_tc,
    panel.id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov = DK ~ year
  )

  m_y2 <- update(m_base, . ~ . | . + countrycode[year2])
  m_y3 <- update(m_base, . ~ . | . + countrycode[year3])

  results[[h + 1]] <- tibble(
    horizon = h,
    model   = c("Linear", "Poly2", "Poly3"),
    r2      = c(as.numeric(fitstat(m_base, "cor2")),
                as.numeric(fitstat(m_y2, "cor2")),
                as.numeric(fitstat(m_y3, "r2"))),
    aic     = c(AIC(m_base), AIC(m_y2), AIC(m_y3)),
    bic     = c(BIC(m_base), BIC(m_y2), BIC(m_y3))
  )
}
model_comp <- bind_rows(results)
model_comp_wide <- model_comp %>%
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = horizon,
    names_from = model,
    values_from = c(r2, aic, bic),
    names_glue = "{model}_{.value}"
  ) %>%
  arrange(horizon)

model_comp_wide

Convolution


H <- 20

# -----------------------------
# 1. Estimate model
# -----------------------------
mod <- feols(
  gdp_diff ~ l(maxwind_treat, 0:H) | countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year,
  data = data_tc, panel.id = c("countrycode", "year"), vcov = DK ~ year
)

# -----------------------------
# 2. Prepare data for Japan
# -----------------------------
usa <- data_tc %>% filter(countrycode == "JPN") %>% arrange(year)

# -----------------------------
# 3. Extract lag coefficients
# -----------------------------
coefs_all <- coef(mod)
lag_coefs <- coefs_all[grep("^l\\(maxwind_treat", names(coefs_all))]
if("maxwind_treat" %in% names(coefs_all)) {
  lag_coefs <- c(`0` = coefs_all["maxwind_treat"], lag_coefs)
  names(lag_coefs)[1] <- "l(maxwind_treat,0)"
}
names(lag_coefs) <- gsub(" ", "", names(lag_coefs))

# -----------------------------
# 4. Identify events
# -----------------------------
usa <- usa %>% mutate(event_id = cumsum(maxwind_treat == 1))
events <- usa %>%
  filter(maxwind_treat == 1) %>%
  select(event_id, event_year = year, maxwind_value = maxwind_treat)

# -----------------------------
# 5. Map each event IRF onto calendar years
# -----------------------------
pred_event_paths <- events %>%
  crossing(h = 0:H) %>%
  mutate(
    coef_name = paste0("l(maxwind_treat,", h, ")"),
    beta_h = lag_coefs[coef_name],
    year = event_year + h,
    contrib = beta_h
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    color_decade = case_when(
      event_year < 1960 ~ "#D55E00",  # Orange-red (1950s)
      event_year < 1970 ~ "#F0E442",  # Yellow (1960s)
      event_year < 1980 ~ "#CC79A7",  # Purple (1970s)
      event_year < 1990 ~ "#56B4E9",  # Light blue (1980s)
      event_year < 2000 ~ "#D55E00",  # Red (1990s)
      event_year < 2010 ~ "#009E73",  # Green (2000s)
      TRUE ~ "#0072B2"                # Dark blue (2010s)
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(event_id) %>%
  arrange(year) %>%
  mutate(cum_effect_event = cumsum(contrib)) %>%
  ungroup()

# -----------------------------
# Panel A: Wind speed by year (bar chart)
# -----------------------------
# This shows the total monthly wind speed for each event
panel_a <- ggplot(events, aes(x = event_year, y = maxwind_value)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = case_when(
    event_year < 1960 ~ "#D55E00",
    event_year < 1970 ~ "#F0E442",
    event_year < 1980 ~ "#CC79A7",
    event_year < 1990 ~ "#56B4E9",
    event_year < 2000 ~ "#D55E00",
    event_year < 2010 ~ "#009E73",
    TRUE ~ "#0072B2"
  )), width = 1) +
  scale_fill_identity() +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(1970, 2024, 10), 
                     expand = c(0.01, 0)) +
  labs(y = expression("Sum of squares of max. wind speed (m s"^-1*")"),
       title = "a") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0, face = "bold")
  )

# -----------------------------
# Panel B: Stacked cumulative effects (stream graph)
# -----------------------------
# Create stacked data - each event gets stacked on top of previous ones
stacked_data <- pred_event_paths %>%
  arrange(year, event_id) %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  mutate(
    y_bottom = lag(cumsum(cum_effect_event), default = 0),
    y_top = cumsum(cum_effect_event)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()


panel_b <- ggplot() +
  geom_ribbon(
    data = stacked_data,
    aes(x = year, ymin = y_bottom, ymax = y_top, 
        group = factor(event_id), color = factor(event_id)),
    alpha = 0.8, fill = NA
  ) +
  scale_fill_identity() +
  theme_classic()

panel_b

Maps of Damages and Recovery


data_tclags <- data_tc %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  arrange(year) %>%
  mutate(
    maxwind_treat_l0 = maxwind_treat,
    maxwind_treat_l1 = lag(maxwind_treat, 1),
    maxwind_treat_l2 = lag(maxwind_treat, 2),
    maxwind_treat_l3 = lag(maxwind_treat, 3),
    maxwind_treat_l4 = lag(maxwind_treat, 4),
    maxwind_treat_l5 = lag(maxwind_treat, 5),
    maxwind_treat_l6 = lag(maxwind_treat, 6),
    maxwind_treat_l7 = lag(maxwind_treat, 7),
    maxwind_treat_l8 = lag(maxwind_treat, 8),
    maxwind_treat_l9 = lag(maxwind_treat, 9),
    maxwind_treat_l10 = lag(maxwind_treat, 10)) %>% 
  ungroup()

dl_model <- feols(
  loggdp ~ i(countrycode, maxwind_treat_l0) + 
    i(countrycode, maxwind_treat_l1) +
    i(countrycode, maxwind_treat_l2) +
    i(countrycode, maxwind_treat_l3) +
    i(countrycode, maxwind_treat_l4) +
    i(countrycode, maxwind_treat_l5) +
    i(countrycode, maxwind_treat_l6) +
    i(countrycode, maxwind_treat_l7) +
    i(countrycode, maxwind_treat_l8) +
    i(countrycode, maxwind_treat_l9) +
    i(countrycode, maxwind_treat_l10)  | countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year,
  data = data_tclags,
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year"),
  vcov = DK ~ year
)

coef_df <- data.frame(
  term     = names(coef(dl_model)),
  estimate = coef(dl_model)
) %>%
  filter(str_detect(term, "::")) %>%
  mutate(
    country = str_match(term, ".*::(.*?):")[, 2],
    lag     = as.integer(str_match(term, "maxwind_treat_l([0-9]+)")[, 2])
  ) %>%
  arrange(country, lag)

irfs <- coef_df %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  arrange(lag) %>%
  mutate(
    estimate = cumsum(estimate)   # IRF at each lag h
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

irf_recovery <- irfs %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  arrange(lag) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(
    first_below_zero = ifelse(any(estimate < 0), min(lag[estimate < 0]), NA_real_),
    first_back_to_zero = ifelse(
      any(estimate < 0) & any(estimate >= 0 & lag > min(lag[estimate < 0])),
      min(lag[estimate >= 0 & lag > min(lag[estimate < 0])]),
      NA_real_
    ),
    recovery_time = case_when(
      is.na(first_below_zero) ~ 0,      # never goes below 0
      is.na(first_back_to_zero) ~ H + 1, # never recovers within horizon
      TRUE ~ first_back_to_zero - first_below_zero
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# join with world map
world_joined <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
  left_join(irf_recovery, by = c("iso_a3" = "country"))

# define discrete colors
colors <- RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9, "YlOrRd")
breaks <- c(0, 1, 2, 3, 5, 7, 10, 12)
labels <- c("0", "1", "2", "3", "5", "7", "10", "10+")

ggplot(world_joined) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = recovery_time), color = "white", linewidth = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_stepsn(
    colours = colors,
    breaks  = breaks,
    limits  = c(0, 12),
    labels  = labels,
    na.value = "grey90",
    name = "Years to Recovery",
    guide = guide_colorsteps(
      barheight = unit(3.5, "cm"),
      barwidth  = unit(0.6, "cm"),
      show.limits = TRUE,
      title.position = "top"
    )
  ) +
  coord_sf(crs = "+proj=robin") +  # Robinson projection
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.direction = "vertical",
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

ggsave("figures/map_recovery_time_DL.png", width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
H <- 10
irf_list <- list()

for (h in 0:H) {
  fe_model <- feols(
    f(loggdp, h) - l(loggdp, 1) ~ i(countrycode, maxwind_treat) |
      countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year,
    data = data_tc,
    panel.id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov = DK ~ year
  )
  
  coef_df <- data.frame(
    horizon  = h,
    term     = names(coef(fe_model)),
    estimate = coef(fe_model)
  )
  
  coef_df <- coef_df %>%
    filter(str_detect(term, "::")) %>%
    mutate(
      country = str_match(term, ".*::(.*?):.*")[, 2]
    )
  
  irf_list[[h + 1]] <- coef_df
}

irfs <- bind_rows(irf_list)


irf_recovery <- irfs %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  arrange(horizon) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(
    first_below_zero = ifelse(any(estimate < 0), min(horizon[estimate < 0]), NA_real_),
    first_back_to_zero = ifelse(
      any(estimate < 0) & any(estimate >= 0 & horizon > min(horizon[estimate < 0])),
      min(horizon[estimate >= 0 & horizon > min(horizon[estimate < 0])]),
      NA_real_
    ),
    recovery_time = case_when(
      is.na(first_below_zero) ~ -1,      # never goes below 0
      is.na(first_back_to_zero) ~ H + 1, # never recovers within horizon
      TRUE ~ first_back_to_zero - first_below_zero
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


world_joined <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
  left_join(irf_recovery, by = c("iso_a3" = "country"))


colors <- RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9, "YlOrRd")
breaks <- c(0, 1, 2, 3, 5, 7, 10, 12)
labels <- c("0", "1", "2", "3", "5", "7", "10", "10+")


ggplot(world_joined) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = recovery_time), color = "white", linewidth = 0.1) +
  
  scale_fill_stepsn(
    colours = colors,
    breaks  = breaks,
    limits  = c(0, 12),
    labels  = labels,
    na.value = "grey90",
    name = "Years to Recovery",
    guide = guide_colorsteps(
      barheight = unit(3.5, "cm"),
      barwidth  = unit(0.6, "cm"),
      show.limits = TRUE,
      title.position = "top"
    )
  ) +
  
  coord_sf(crs = "+proj=robin") +  # Robinson projection
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.direction = "vertical",
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

# Save figure
ggsave("figures/map_recovery_time_LP.png", width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
H <- 5  # horizon
irf_list <- list()

for (h in 0:H) {
  
  
  # FE model with interaction between maxwind_sqkm and country
  fe_model <- feols(
    f(loggdp,h) - l(loggdp,1)  ~ i(countrycode,maxwind_treat)  | countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2]  + year,
    data = data_tc, panel.id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov = DK ~ year
  )
  
  # Extract coefficients and SEs
  coef_df <- data.frame(
    horizon = h,
    term = names(coef(fe_model)),
    estimate = coef(fe_model),
    se = sqrt(diag(vcov(fe_model)))
  )
  
  # Keep only interaction terms of the form i(countrycode, maxwind_sqkm)
  coef_df <- coef_df %>%
    filter(str_detect(term, "::")) %>%
    mutate(
      country = str_match(term, ".*::(.*?):.*")[,2]
    )
  
  irf_list[[h + 1]] <- coef_df
}

# Combine all horizons
irfs <- bind_rows(irf_list)

irf_extreme <- irfs %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  slice_min(order_by = estimate, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    lower = estimate - 1.96 * se,
    upper = estimate + 1.96 * se,
    sig = ifelse(lower > 0 | upper < 0, "significant", "nonsignificant")
  )


# Join with world map
world_joined <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
  left_join(irf_extreme, by = c("iso_a3" = "country"))

labels <- c(
  "-10%", "-7.5%", "-5%", "-2.5%", "0%",
  "2.5%", "5%", "7.5%", "10%"
)

breaks <- seq(-0.10, 0.10, by = 0.025)

ggplot(world_joined) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = estimate), color = "white", linewidth = 0.1) +
  
  scale_fill_stepsn(
    colours = scales::brewer_pal(type = "div", palette = "RdBu")(9),
    breaks  = breaks,
    limits  = c(-0.10, 0.10),
    labels  = labels,
    oob     = scales::squish,
    name    = "GDP growth"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 11),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  ) +
  
  guides(
    fill = guide_colorsteps(
      barheight = unit(5, "cm"),
      barwidth  = unit(0.8, "cm"),
      ticks = TRUE,
      frame.colour = "black"
    )
  )

ggsave("figures/map_h5.png", dpi = 300)

H <- 10 # horizon
irf_list <- list()

# Step 1: Estimate IRFs for each horizon
for (h in 0:H) {
  fe_model <- feols(
    f(loggdp, h) - l(loggdp, 1) ~ i(countrycode, maxwind_treat)  |
      countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year ,
    data = data_tc,
    panel.id = c("countrycode", "year"),
    vcov = DK ~ year
  )
  
  coef_df <- data.frame(
    horizon  = h,
    term     = names(coef(fe_model)),
    estimate = coef(fe_model)
  )
  
  # Keep only interaction terms
  coef_df <- coef_df %>%
    filter(str_detect(term, "::")) %>%
    mutate(
      country = str_match(term, ".*::(.*?):.*")[, 2]
    )
  
  irf_list[[h + 1]] <- coef_df
}

# Step 2: Combine into one data frame
irfs <- bind_rows(irf_list)

# Step 3: Compute recovery time based on mean IRF crossing zero
irf_recovery <- irfs %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  arrange(horizon) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(
    first_below_zero = ifelse(any(estimate < 0), min(horizon[estimate < 0]), NA_real_),
    first_back_to_zero = ifelse(
      any(estimate < 0) & any(estimate >= 0 & horizon > min(horizon[estimate < 0])),
      min(horizon[estimate >= 0 & horizon > min(horizon[estimate < 0])]),
      NA_real_
    ),
    recovery_time = case_when(
      is.na(first_below_zero) ~ -1,  # never goes below 0
      is.na(first_back_to_zero) ~ H+1,  # never recovers within horizon
      TRUE ~ first_back_to_zero - first_below_zero
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Step 4: Join with world map
world_joined <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
  left_join(irf_recovery, by = c("iso_a3" = "country"))

world_joined <- world_joined %>%
  mutate(recovery_bin = case_when(
    is.na(recovery_time)        ~ NA_character_,
    recovery_time == H+1       ~ "Never recovers",
    recovery_time <= 0         ~ "0",
    recovery_time <= 5         ~ "1–5",
    recovery_time <= 10        ~ "6–10",
    recovery_time <= 15        ~ "11–15",
    recovery_time <= 20        ~ "16–20",
    TRUE                       ~ "20+"
  )) %>%
  mutate(recovery_bin = factor(
    recovery_bin,
    levels = c("0", "1–5", "6–10", "11–15", "16–20", "20+", "Never recovers")
  ))

cols <- c(
  "0"             = "#0b6f6b",   # dark teal

  "1–5"           = "#f1cc4e",   # strong yellow
  "6–10"          = "#f39c12",   # orange
  "11–15"         = "#e67e22",   # deep orange
  "16–20"         = "#d35400",   # red-orange
  "20+"           = "#8e2a1f",   # dark red

  "Never recovers"= "black"
)

ggplot(world_joined) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = recovery_bin), color = "white", linewidth = 0.1) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(
    values   = cols,
    name     = "Recovery time (years)",
    na.value = "grey80",
    drop     = FALSE
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",

    # Make legend slimmer
    legend.key.width  = unit(0.6, "cm"),
    legend.key.height = unit(0.45, "cm"),

    # Give more room to the map
    plot.margin = margin(5, 20, 5, 5),

    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 11),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  ) +
  
  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(
      ncol = 1,
      byrow = TRUE,
      keywidth  = unit(0.6, "cm"),
      keyheight = unit(0.45, "cm")
    )
  )
ggsave("figures/map_recovery_time.png", dpi = 300)

GLOBAL MICRO

data_1deg <- read_csv("processed data/gdp_tc_0_5deg.csv") 

data_1deg <- data_1deg %>%
  mutate(
    year2 = year^2,
    latlon = paste0(lat, "_", lon)
  ) %>%
filter(
  is.finite(wind)
) %>% 
filter(!is.na(wind)) %>% 
  #drop 2020 and 2021 because of covid
filter(year <= 2019)

data_1deg <- data_1deg %>%
  mutate(
    wind_p90 = quantile(wind, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE),
    wind_90 = ifelse(wind >= wind_p90, 1, 0),
    wind_10ms = ifelse(wind >= 10, 1, 0),
    wind_21ms = ifelse(wind >= 21, 1, 0)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

make_shock <- function(
  data,
  var,
  p = 0.95,
  baseline_start = 1979,
  baseline_end   = 2020
) {

fe_model <- feols(
  fml = as.formula(paste0(var, " ~ 0 | latlon + year")),
  data    = data
)

  shock_name <- paste0(var, "_shock")
  treat_name <- paste0(var, "_treat")
  treat_forever_name <- paste0(var, "_treat_forever")
  first_treat_name <- paste0(var, "_first_treat_year")
  thresh_name <- paste0(shock_name, "_p")

  data[[shock_name]] <- resid(fe_model)

  # 🔹 GLOBAL threshold across all countries (baseline window only)
  global_thresh <- quantile(
    data[[shock_name]][
      data$year >= baseline_start & data$year <= baseline_end
    ],
    p,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  data <- data %>%
    group_by(latlon) %>%
    mutate(

      # same threshold for everyone
      !!thresh_name := global_thresh,

      # treatment defined using global threshold
      !!treat_name := as.integer(
        .data[[shock_name]] >= global_thresh
      ),

      # zero out if underlying variable is zero
      !!treat_name := ifelse(.data[[var]] > 0, .data[[treat_name]], 0),

      # first treatment year
      !!first_treat_name := if_else(
        any(.data[[treat_name]] == 1),
        min(year[.data[[treat_name]] == 1]),
        NA_real_
      ),

      # treat forever
      !!treat_forever_name := as.integer(
        !is.na(.data[[first_treat_name]]) &
          year >= .data[[first_treat_name]]
      )
    ) %>%
    ungroup()

  return(data)
}



data_1deg <- data_1deg %>%
 make_shock("wind")
irfs_wind_cumulative <- cumulative_dl(
  data = data_1deg,
  outcome = "growth",
  main_var = "wind_treat",
  lags = 0:3,
  fe = "latlon[year] + latlon[year2] + year + country^year",
  panel_id = c("latlon", "year"),
  vcov_formula = conley(cutoff=500),
  shock_label = "Maximum Wind Speed Treatment"
) %>% mutate(type = "Distributed Lag")

irfs_wind_lp <- lp_panel(
  data = data_1deg,
  outcome = "loggdp",
  main_var = "wind_treat",
  horizon = 3,
  fe = "latlon[year] + latlon[year2] + year + country^year ",
  panel_id = c("latlon", "year"),
  vcov_formula = conley(cutoff=500)
) %>% mutate(type = "Local Projection")

irfs_combined <- bind_rows(irfs_wind_cumulative, irfs_wind_lp)


# Plot both as a facet
ggplot(irfs_combined, aes(x = ifelse(type == "Distributed Lag", lag, horizon), 
                          y = ifelse(type == "Distributed Lag", cumulative_effect, irf_mean))) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.1, color = 'cornflowerblue') +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ifelse(type == "Distributed Lag", lower_ci, irf_down), 
                  ymax = ifelse(type == "Distributed Lag", upper_ci, irf_up)), 
              alpha = 0.2, fill = 'cornflowerblue', color = NA) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(legend.position = "top") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100*x, "%")) +
  labs(x = "Years after Treatment",
       y = "Effect on Income Growth",
       title = "IRF of Storm Treatment on Income Growth") +
  facet_wrap(~type, scales = "free_y") +
  #add 0 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7)
est1 <- feols(
  growth ~ poly(wind_treat,2,raw=TRUE)| latlon[year] + latlon[year2] + year + country^year  ,
  data = data_1deg, panel.id = c("latlon", "year")
)
summary(est1, vcov = conley(cutoff=500))

f <- useful::predict_poly(est1, "wind", min = 0, max = 20, ref = 0, 
                           xvar_name = "wind", ci_level = 95)


# Plot
ggplot(f, aes(x = wind, y = response)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.7) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) 
lp_outcome  <- "loggdp"
lp_horizon  <- 3
lp_fe       <- "latlon[year] + latlon[year2] + year"
lp_panel_id <- c("latlon", "year")
lp_vcov     <- conley(cutoff=500)
lp_interact <- "country"


run_lp <- function(data, main_var, shock_label) {
  
  lp_panel_inter(
    data          = data,
    outcome       = lp_outcome,
    main_var      = main_var,
    interact_var  = lp_interact,
    horizon       = lp_horizon,
    fe            = lp_fe,
    panel_id      = lp_panel_id,
    vcov_formula  = lp_vcov
  ) %>%
    mutate(shock = shock_label)
}


shock_map <- tibble::tibble(
  var   = c(
    "wind",
    "wind_10ms"
  ),
  label = c(
    "Wind speed",
    "wind >10 ms"
  )
)

irfs_all <- purrr::pmap_dfr(
  list(shock_map$var, shock_map$label),
  run_lp,
  data = data_1deg 
) %>% filter(category %in% c("USA", "PHL", "MOZ","JPN"))

ggplot(irfs_all, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean, color = category, fill = category)) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.6) +
  
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
    alpha = 0.2, color = NA
  ) +
  
  geom_line(size = 1.1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ shock, ncol = 3, scales = "free_y") +
  
  labs(
    x = "Horizon (years)",
    y = "Cumulative IRF of GDP per capita",
    color = "Period",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(100 * x, "%")) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

MACRO VS MICRO MAPS

fe_lag0 <- feols(
  f(loggdp,0) - l(loggdp,1) ~ i(country, wind_treat) |
    latlon[year] + latlon[year2] + year + country^year,
  data = data_1deg,
  panel.id = c("latlon", "year"),
  vcov = conley(cutoff = 500)
)

# ---------------------------
# EXTRACT COUNTRY COEFFICIENTS
# ---------------------------
coef_country <- tidy(fe_lag0) %>%
  filter(str_detect(term, ":wind_treat$")) %>%
  mutate(
    iso_a3 = str_remove(term, ":wind_treat$") ,
    
  ) %>% 
    mutate(
    iso_a3 = sub("^country::", "", iso_a3)
  ) %>%
  select(iso_a3, estimate)

# ---------------------------
# JOIN WITH WORLD MAP
# ---------------------------
world_joined <- ne_countries(
  scale = "medium",
  returnclass = "sf"
) %>%
  left_join(coef_country, by = "iso_a3")

# ---------------------------
# MAP
# ---------------------------
ggplot(world_joined) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = estimate), color = "white", size = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colours = brewer_pal(type = "div", palette = "RdBu")(9),
    limits  = c(-0.02, 0.02),
    breaks  = seq(-0.02, 0.02, by = 0.005),
    labels  = percent_format(accuracy = 0.5),
    na.value = "grey90",
    name = "GDP growth"
  ) +
  coord_sf(expand = FALSE) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "right"
  ) +
  #robinson
  coord_sf(crs = "+proj=robin") +
  guides(
    fill = guide_colorbar(
      barheight = unit(5, "cm"),
      barwidth  = unit(0.6, "cm")
    )
  )

fe_lag0 <- feols(
  f(loggdp,0) - l(loggdp,1) ~ i(countrycode, maxwind_treat) |
    countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + year,
  data = data_tc,
  panel.id = c("countrycode", "year"),
  vcov = DK ~ year
)

# ---------------------------
# EXTRACT COUNTRY COEFFICIENTS
# ---------------------------
coef_country <- tidy(fe_lag0) %>%
  filter(str_detect(term, ":maxwind_treat$")) %>%
  mutate(
    iso_a3 = str_remove(term, ":maxwind_treat$") ,
    
  ) %>% 
    mutate(
    iso_a3 = sub("^countrycode::", "", iso_a3)
  ) %>%
  select(iso_a3, estimate)

# ---------------------------
# JOIN WITH WORLD MAP
# ---------------------------
world_joined <- ne_countries(
  scale = "medium",
  returnclass = "sf"
) %>%
  left_join(coef_country, by = "iso_a3")

# ---------------------------
# MAP
# ---------------------------
ggplot(world_joined) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = estimate), color = "white", size = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colours = brewer_pal(type = "div", palette = "RdBu")(9),
    limits  = c(-0.02, 0.02),
    breaks  = seq(-0.02, 0.02, by = 0.005),
    labels  = percent_format(accuracy = 0.5),
    na.value = "grey90",
    name = "GDP growth"
  ) +
  coord_sf(expand = FALSE) +
   coord_sf(crs = "+proj=robin") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "right"
  ) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_colorbar(
      barheight = unit(5, "cm"),
      barwidth  = unit(0.6, "cm")
    )
  )
